Develop a residential real estate luxury listings deck for clients. Output as 'Luxury_Estate_Listings.pptx', write in English, and configure 4:3 Standard landscape slides. The aesthetic should be warm beige and wood tones with elegant serif fonts. You are not allowed to fetch data or images via external APIs; rely solely on hardcoded values within your codebase. When adding charts, you must utilize XL_CHART_TYPE instead of ChartType. It is also mandatory to check if slide.shapes.title is not None before assigning to its .text field.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Luxury_Estate_Listings.pptx"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

PALETTE = {
    "cream": "#FDF8F2",
    "gold": "#C4A882",
    "dark_wood": "#8B6914",
    "espresso": "#3E2723",
    "taupe": "#D4C5A9",
    "warm_white": "#FAF5EF",
}

FONT_STACK = ["Georgia", "Palatino Linotype", "Times New Roman"]


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str: str) -> RGBColor:
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex: str):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(
    slide, left, top, width, height, text,
    font_name="Georgia", font_size=14, bold=False,
    color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, italic=False,
):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = font_name
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.italic = italic
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color="#FAF5EF", border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(text, slide, left, top, font_size=12, color_hex="#C4A882"):
    txBox = add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(6), Pt(font_size + 4), text,
                          font_name="Georgia", font_size=font_size, bold=True,
                          color_hex=color_hex)
    return txBox


def add_footer(prs, slide, text="© 2024 Prestige Estates"):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(7.15), Inches(8.8), Pt(9), text,
                 font_name="Georgia", font_size=9, color_hex="#D4C5A9",
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D4C5A9")
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#C4A882")
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.6),
                     "Property Photo", font_name="Georgia", font_size=14, color_hex="#8B6914",
                     alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_gold_line(slide, left, top, width):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Pt(2))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#C4A882")
    shape.line.fill.background()


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(1.0),
                 "LUXURY ESTATE", font_name="Georgia", font_size=40, bold=True,
                 color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.6),
                 "LISTINGS", font_name="Georgia", font_size=40, bold=True,
                 color_hex="#8B6914", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(3.25), Inches(3.7), Inches(3.5))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.5),
                 "Exclusive Properties for Discerning Clients", font_name="Palatino Linotype",
                 font_size=18, color_hex="#C4A882", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(6.2), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.5),
                 "Spring 2024 Collection", font_name="Georgia", font_size=13, color_hex="#8B6914",
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(prs, slide, "© 2024 Prestige Estates")


def slide_02_featured_properties(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])

    add_section_label("CURATED COLLECTION", slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Featured Properties"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.6),
                     "Featured Properties", font_name="Georgia", font_size=30, bold=True,
                     color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(4.0), Inches(1.55), Inches(2.0))

    # Three property cards in a row
    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    card_h = Inches(3.6)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2
    card_y = Inches(1.9)

    properties = [
        ("The Oakwood Manor", "$4,850,000", "6 Beds · 5 Baths · 7,200 sqft"),
        ("Riverside Villa Estate", "$3,200,000", "5 Beds · 4 Baths · 5,800 sqft"),
        ("Crestview Heights", "$5,500,000", "7 Beds · 6 Baths · 9,100 sqft"),
    ]

    for i, (name, price, specs) in enumerate(properties):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        card = add_card(slide, x, card_y, card_w, card_h, PALETTE["warm_white"], "#C4A882")

        # Image placeholder area inside card
        add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "", x + Inches(0.15), card_y + Inches(0.15),
                                 card_w - Inches(0.3), Inches(1.6))

        # Property name
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), card_y + Inches(1.9), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4),
                     name, font_name="Georgia", font_size=13, bold=True, color_hex="#3E2723")

        # Price
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), card_y + Inches(2.35), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     price, font_name="Georgia", font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex="#8B6914")

        # Specs
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), card_y + Inches(2.75), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     specs, font_name="Georgia", font_size=10, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_footer(prs, slide)


def slide_03_spotlight(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])

    add_section_label("FEATURED LISTING", slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "The Oakwood Manor"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.6),
                     "The Oakwood Manor", font_name="Georgia", font_size=30, bold=True,
                     color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(4.0), Inches(1.55), Inches(2.0))

    # Left: large image placeholder
    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "", Inches(0.6), Inches(1.8), Inches(3.0), Inches(4.5))

    # Right: property details
    detail_left = Inches(3.9)
    detail_top = Inches(1.8)
    detail_width = Inches(5.5)

    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top, detail_width, Inches(0.4),
                 "Price", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex="#C4A882")
    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(0.35), detail_width, Inches(0.5),
                 "$4,850,000", font_name="Georgia", font_size=26, bold=True, color_hex="#3E2723")

    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(1.0), detail_width, Inches(0.3),
                 "Address", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex="#C4A882")
    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(1.35), detail_width, Inches(0.3),
                 "142 Oakwood Drive, Beverly Hills, CA 90210", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(1.85), detail_width, Inches(0.3),
                 "Specifications", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex="#C4A882")
    specs = "6 Bedrooms · 5 Full Baths · 7,200 Sq Ft\nBuilt-in Gourmet Kitchen · Private Pool & Spa\nWine Cellar · Home Theater · 3-Car Garage"
    add_text_box(slide, detail_left, detail_top + Inches(2.15), detail_width, Inches(1.4),
                 specs, font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(6.3), Inches(8.8))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(6.5), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "A masterpiece of modern luxury nestled among century-old oak trees", font_name="Palatino Linotype",
                 font_size=13, color_hex="#C4A882", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(prs, slide)


def slide_04_contact(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PALETTE["cream"])

    add_section_label("GET IN TOUCH", slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Schedule a Private Viewing"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(0.6),
                     "Schedule a Private Viewing", font_name="Georgia", font_size=30, bold=True,
                     color_hex="#3E2723", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(1.55), Inches(3.0))

    # Two contact cards side by side
    card_w = Inches(4.0)
    card_h = Inches(3.2)
    gap = Inches(0.8)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_w - gap) / 2
    card_y = Inches(1.9)

    # Left card: Agent details
    agent_card = add_card(slide, start_x, card_y, card_w, card_h, PALETTE["warm_white"], "#C4A882")
    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(0.3), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                 "Your Luxury Agent", font_name="Georgia", font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(0.75), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.35),
                 "Alexandra Whitmore", font_name="Georgia", font_size=20, bold=True, color_hex="#3E2723")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(1.2), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Senior Estate Advisor", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#C4A882")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(1.75), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Phone: (310) 555-0192", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(2.1), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Email: a.whitmore@prestigeestates.com", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(2.45), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "License #DRE 01987654", font_name="Georgia", font_size=11, color_hex="#C4A882")

    # Right card: Office details
    office_card = add_card(slide, start_x + card_w + gap, card_y, card_w, card_h, PALETTE["warm_white"], "#C4A882")
    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(0.3), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                 "Prestige Estates", font_name="Georgia", font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(0.75), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Luxury Real Estate Group", font_name="Georgia", font_size=14, color_hex="#3E2723")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(1.2), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "8500 Wilshire Blvd, Suite 400", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(1.5), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Beverly Hills, CA 90211", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(2.0), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "Office: (310) 555-0100", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_text_box(slide, start_x + card_w + gap + Inches(0.3), card_y + Inches(2.35), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3),
                 "www.prestigeestates.com", font_name="Georgia", font_size=12, color_hex="#8B6914")

    add_gold_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.5), Inches(8.8))

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.7), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Private viewings available by appointment only", font_name="Palatino Linotype",
                 font_size=13, color_hex="#C4A882", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(prs, slide)


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_featured_properties(prs)
    slide_03_spotlight(prs)
    slide_04_contact(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

Create a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Annual School Board Review' for local education administrators. The deck needs 20 slides following an academic theme with traditional serif fonts and muted colors. Write all content in English and set the slide size to 4:3 Standard orientation. Save the final file as school_review.pptx. Do not use external APIs or web scraping. You are required to use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Additionally, you must check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text on the title shape. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import ChartData
import os

# ── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10.0)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT

# Color palette (muted academic)
NAVY = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x3A, 0x5C)
BURGUNDY = RGBColor(0x8B, 0x2E, 0x4F)
GOLD = RGBColor(0xC9, 0xA9, 0x6E)
CREAM = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF0, 0xE6)
CHARCOAL = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x2D, 0x2D)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xED, 0xE7, 0xDB)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6B, 0x6B, 0x6B)

# Fonts
FONT_HEADING = "Georgia"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_ACCENT = "Times New Roman"

OUTPUT_FILE = "school_review.pptx"


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    """Fill the slide background with a solid color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_name=FONT_BODY,
                 font_size=14, bold=False, color=CHARCOAL, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    """Create a formatted text box."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = font_name
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    """Add a rounded rectangle card with optional colored border."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(
        MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height
    )
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, section_num):
    """Add a numbered section header with decorative line."""
    left = MARGIN_LEFT
    top = Inches(0.35)
    width = CONTENT_WIDTH

    # Section number badge
    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    badge.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.05), top + Inches(0.02), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.36),
                 str(section_num), font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Label text
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.55), top + Inches(0.02), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.36),
                 label_text, font_name=FONT_HEADING, font_size=18, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    # Decorative line
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(0.55), top + Inches(0.42),
                                  Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=20):
    """Add a footer with district name and page number."""
    left = MARGIN_LEFT
    top = Inches(7.1)
    width = CONTENT_WIDTH

    # Thin gold line above footer
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top - Inches(0.08),
                                  width, Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left, top + Inches(0.05), width, Inches(0.15),
                 "District School Board — Annual Review", font_name=FONT_BODY,
                 font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, slide.shapes[-1].left + Inches(4.5), top + Inches(0.05),
                 Inches(2), Inches(0.15),
                 f"Slide {slide_num} of {total}", font_name=FONT_BODY,
                 font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text="Image"):
    """Insert image if file exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY, border_color=GOLD)
        # Add icon-like cross
        h_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE,
                                        left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.25),
                                        Inches(1.4), Pt(2))
        h_line.fill.solid()
        h_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
        h_line.line.fill.background()
        v_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE,
                                        left + Inches(0.95), top + Inches(0.15),
                                        Pt(2), Inches(1.2))
        v_line.fill.solid()
        v_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
        v_line.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.45),
                     Inches(1.4), Inches(0.6), alt_text, font_name=FONT_BODY,
                     font_size=10, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, CREAM)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(7), Inches(0.9),
                 "Annual School Board Review", font_name=FONT_HEADING,
                 font_size=36, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Gold accent bar

BLACK = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2C, 0x2C, 0x2C)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6B, 0x7B, 0x8D)

RISK_RED = RGBColor(0xE6, 0x39, 0x46)
RISK_AMBER = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xB7, 0x03)
RISK_GREEN = RGBColor(0x2D, 0xC6, 0x53)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Calibri"


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(*color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_PRIMARY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text, body_text="",
             bg_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title_text
    run.font.size = Pt(14)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    if body_text:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        run2 = p2.add_run()
        run2.text = body_text
        run2.font.size = Pt(11)
        run2.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        run2.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=24, color=PRIMARY_COLOR):
    return add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(10), Inches(0.8), text,
                        font_size=font_size, bold=True, color=color)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=25):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4),
                 str(slide_num), font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.4),
                     height - Inches(0.6), "Image Placeholder", font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY,
                     alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_table(slide, rows, cols, data, left, top, width, height, header_color=PRIMARY_COLOR):
    table_shape = slide.shapes.add_table(rows, cols, left, top, width, height)
    table = table_shape.table

    for col_idx in range(cols):
        cell = table.cell(0, col_idx)
        cell.text = data[0][col_idx] if rows > 0 else ""
        for paragraph in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
            paragraph.font.size = Pt(10)
            paragraph.font.bold = True
            paragraph.font.color.rgb = WHITE
            paragraph.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
        cell.fill.solid()
        cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = header_color

    for row_idx in range(1, rows):
        for col_idx in range(cols):
            cell = table.cell(row_idx, col_idx)
            cell.text = data[row_idx][col_idx] if len(data) > row_idx and len(data[row_idx]) > col_idx else ""
            for paragraph in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
                paragraph.font.size = Pt(9)
                paragraph.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
                paragraph.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
            if row_idx % 2 == 0:
                cell.fill.solid()
                cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    return table_shape


def _build_category_chart(chart_dict):
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    cat_data = CategoryChartData()
    for c in chart_dict['categories']:
        cat_data.add_category(c)
    for name, values in chart_dict['series']:
        cat_data.add_series(name, tuple(values))
    return cat_data


def add_line_chart(slide, chart_data, title_text, left, top, width, height):
    if isinstance(chart_data, dict):
        chart_data = _build_category_chart(chart_data)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    if chart.has_title:
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = title_text
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(12)
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.line.width = Pt(2)
        series.has_data_labels = False

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    if value_axis.has_title:
        value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Risk Score"
        value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(9)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(8)

    return chart_frame

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(5.625)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)

NAVY = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x3A, 0x5C)
TEAL = RGBColor(0x2E, 0x86, 0xAB)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF4, 0xF6, 0xF9)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x34, 0x36)
ACCENT_RED = RGBColor(0xE7, 0x4C, 0x3C)
ACCENT_GREEN = RGBColor(0x27, 0xAE, 0x60)
GRID_LINE = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
SUBTLE_GRAY = RGBColor(0xEC, 0xF0, 0xF1)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color=WHITE):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_title_bar(slide, title_text, subtitle_text=None):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.15), SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(1), Inches(0.7))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.2), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.4), title_text, font_size=20, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    if subtitle_text:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.45), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.3), subtitle_text, font_size=11, color=RGBColor(0xBB, 0xCC, 0xDD))


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body_text="", bg_color=CARD_BG):
    card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    card.fill.solid()
    card.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    card.line.color.rgb = GRID_LINE
    card.line.width = Pt(1)

    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.08), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.25), title, font_size=11, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    if body_text:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.35), width - Inches(0.3), height - Inches(0.45), body_text, font_size=9, color=DARK_TEXT)


def add_data_table(slide, left, top, rows, cols, data_list):
    table_shape = slide.shapes.add_table(rows, cols, left, top, Inches(8), Inches(3))
    table = table_shape.table

    for i in range(rows):
        for j in range(cols):
            cell = table.cell(i, j)
            cell.text = str(data_list[i][j]) if i < len(data_list) and j < len(data_list[i]) else ""
            for paragraph in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
                paragraph.font.size = Pt(9)
                paragraph.font.name = "Calibri"
                paragraph.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
                if i == 0:
                    paragraph.font.bold = True
                    paragraph.font.color.rgb = WHITE
            if i == 0:
                cell.fill.solid()
                cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = NAVY
            elif i % 2 == 0:
                cell.fill.solid()
                cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = SUBTLE_GRAY

    return table_shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.1), Inches(5.35), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.2), label_text, font_size=7, color=GRID_LINE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_footer(slide, text="CONFIDENTIAL | Clinical Trial Results"):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(5.35), Inches(4), Inches(0.2), text, font_size=7, color=GRID_LINE)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = SUBTLE_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = GRID_LINE
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.4), "Image Placeholder", font_size=9, color=GRID_LINE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_1_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(9), Inches(1), "Clinical Trial Results", font_size=36, bold=True, color=NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.4), Inches(9), Inches(0.5), "Phase III Randomized Controlled Study — Efficacy and Safety Analysis", font_size=16, color=TEAL, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.8), Inches(3.2), Inches(2.4), Inches(0.05))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(9), Inches(0.8), "Study Protocol: CT-2024-017\nPrincipal Investigator: Dr. Sarah Mitchell, MD, PhD\nInstitution: National Center for Clinical Research", font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide)


def slide_2_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_GRAY)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Executive Summary", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    cards_data = [
        ("Study Population", "N = 1,247 patients\nRandomized 2:1 (Treatment vs Placebo)", Inches(0.5), Inches(0.8)),
        ("Primary Endpoint", "Met with p < 0.001\nSignificant improvement in clinical response rate", Inches(3.6), Inches(0.8)),
        ("Safety Profile", "Well-tolerated overall\nAEs comparable to placebo group", Inches(6.7), Inches(0.8)),
    ]
    for title, body, left, top in cards_data:
        add_card(slide, left, top, Inches(2.9), Inches(1.5), title, body)

    summary_text = "This Phase III trial evaluated the efficacy and safety of investigational therapy CT-017 versus placebo in patients with moderate-to-severe condition. The study met its primary endpoint with statistically significant improvement across all secondary endpoints."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.6), Inches(9), Inches(1.8), "Key Findings", summary_text)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 2")


def slide_3_study_design(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Study Design & Methodology"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Study Design & Methodology", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    design_items = [
        ("Design Type", "Multicenter, randomized,\ndouble-blind, placebo-controlled"),
        ("Duration", "52 weeks treatment\n+ 16-week follow-up"),
        ("Randomization", "Computer-generated,\nstratified by site and severity"),
        ("Blinding", "Double-dummy technique\nfor both arms"),
    ]
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(design_items):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(0.8), Inches(2.1), Inches(1.6), title, body)

    criteria_text = "Inclusion Criteria: Adults aged 18-75 with confirmed diagnosis; moderate-to-severe disease severity (score ≥ 4). Exclusion Criteria: Pregnancy; concurrent immunosuppressive therapy; history of severe hypersensitivity to study drug."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.6), Inches(9), Inches(1.3), "Eligibility Criteria", criteria_text)

    flow_items = ["Screening (N=1,847)", "Randomized (N=1,247)", "Treatment (52 wks)", "Follow-up (16 wks)"]
    for i, item in enumerate(flow_items):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(4.1), Inches(2.1), Inches(0.8), "", item)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 3")

def slide_5_primary_endpoint(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Primary Endpoint Results"

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Week 12", "Week 24", "Week 36", "Week 52"]
    chart_data.add_series("Treatment (N=831)", (72.4, 78.9, 81.3, 84.1))
    chart_data.add_series("Placebo (N=416)", (34.2, 38.5, 40.1, 42.8))

    left = Inches(0.5)
    top = Inches(0.7)

def slide_8_safety_profile(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    safety_items = [
        ("Overall AE Rate", "Treatment: 68.3%\nPlacebo: 61.7%", TEAL),
        ("Serious AEs", "Treatment: 4.2%\nPlacebo: 3.8%", ACCENT_RED),
        ("AEs Leading to Discontinuation", "Treatment: 5.1%\nPlacebo: 4.6%", ACCENT_RED),

    ]
    for i, (title, body, color) in enumerate(safety_items):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(0.7), Inches(2.1), Inches(1.8), title, body, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY if "Serious" not in title else RGBColor(0xFD, 0xED, 0xEC))

    summary = "The safety profile of CT-017 was consistent with the known pharmacological properties. No new safety signals were identified during the study period."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(9), Inches(1.3), "Safety Summary", summary)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 8")

def slide_13_pharmacokinetics(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Pharmacokinetic Parameters"
    else:

    data = [
        ["Parameter", "Cmax (ng/mL)", "Tmax (hrs)", "AUC₀₋₂₄ (ng·hr/mL)", "t½ (hrs)"],
        ["Day 1 (N=48)", "24.6 ± 5.3", "2.1 ± 0.8", "187.4 ± 32.1", "14.2 ± 3.6"],
        ["Week 12 (N=45)", "26.1 ± 5.8", "2.3 ± 0.9", "195.8 ± 35.4", "14.8 ± 3.9"],
        ["Steady State", "27.3 ± 6.1", "2.4 ± 0.7", "201.2 ± 38.7", "15.1 ± 4.1"],
    ]
    add_data_table(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.7), len(data), len(data[0]), data)

    pk_text = "Pharmacokinetic parameters demonstrated linear accumulation with no evidence of time-dependent changes in clearance or bioavailability over the 12-week treatment period."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(9), Inches(1.0), "PK Summary", pk_text)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 13")

def slide_16_statistical_methods(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Statistical Methods"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Statistical Methods", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    methods = [
        ("Primary Analysis", "Mixed Model for Repeated Measures (MMRM)\nwith treatment, visit, and interaction terms"),
        ("Secondary Endpoints", "ANCOVA with baseline as covariate\nand stratification factors included"),
        ("Safety Analysis", "Descriptive statistics\nFisher's exact test for categorical AEs"),
        ("Subgroup Analysis", "Interaction tests in MMRM model\nNo multiplicity adjustment applied"),
    ]
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(methods):
        left = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.3)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(0.7), Inches(2.1), Inches(2.8), title, body)

    alpha_text = "Statistical significance was defined as two-sided p-value < 0.05. All analyses were performed on the Intent-to-Treat (ITT) population using LOCF imputation for missing data."
    add_card(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(9), Inches(1.2), "Analysis Population", alpha_text)

    add_section_label(slide, "Slide 16")


def slide_17_confidence_intervals(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Confidence Intervals"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.4), "Confidence Intervals", font_size=22, bold=True, color=NAVY)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Clinical Response", "DAS-28 Reduction", "PGA Change", "TJC-28", "SJC-66"]
    chart_data.add_series("Lower Bound", [0.52, 1.45, 18.3, 3.8, 2.4])
    chart_data.add_series("Upper Bound", [1.98, 2.75, 31.2, 6.8, 4.6])

    left = Inches(0.5)
    top = Inches(0.7)
    width = Inches(6.5)
    height = Inches(3.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.BAR_STACKED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series_1 = plot.series[0]
    series_1.format.fill.solid()
    series_1.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL
    series_2 = plot.series[1]
    series_2.format.fill.solid()
    series_2.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0x5B, 0xA3, 0xC8)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(5.625)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CONTENT_TOP = Inches(0.4)
CONTENT_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)

COLOR_DEEP_RED = RGBColor(139, 0, 0)
COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD = RGBColor(212, 175, 55)
COLOR_CREAM_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 248, 231)
COLOR_CHARCOAL = RGBColor(44, 44, 44)
COLOR_BURGUNDY = RGBColor(165, 42, 42)
COLOR_SOFT_GOLD = RGBColor(245, 222, 179)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(230, 230, 230)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(color_input):
    if isinstance(color_input, RGBColor):
        return color_input
    h = color_input.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body=None, bg_color=COLOR_CREAM_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=13, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.65), body, font_size=11, color=COLOR_CHARCOAL)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=28):
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(9), Inches(0.6), text, font_size=font_size, bold=True, color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=14):
    footer_text = f"Holiday Sales Projection | Slide {slide_num} of {total}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.3), footer_text, font_size=9, color=COLOR_BURGUNDY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.3), "Seasonal Image Placeholder", font_size=11, color=COLOR_BURGUNDY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_decorative_line(slide, left, top, width, color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.04))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_bullet_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=12):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.space_after = Pt(6)
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_CHARCOAL
    return txBox


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_1_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#8B0000")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(7), Inches(1.2), "Holiday Sales Projection", font_size=44, bold=True, color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

Create a Python script using python-pptx to build an 20-slide futuristic tech presentation for C-Suite executives in the telecommunications industry analyzing network upgrades. from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip('#')
    return RGBColor(int(hex_color[0:2], 16), int(hex_color[2:4], 16), int(hex_color[4:6], 16))


WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

BG_DARK = hex_to_rgb('#0A1628')
BG_MID = hex_to_rgb('#121E33')
ACCENT_BLUE = hex_to_rgb('#00D4FF')
ACCENT_CYAN = hex_to_rgb('#00E5FF')
WHITE = hex_to_rgb('#FFFFFF')
LIGHT_GRAY = hex_to_rgb('#B0C4DE')
GOLD = hex_to_rgb('#FFD700')
RED_ACCENT = hex_to_rgb('#FF6B6B')
GREEN_ACCENT = hex_to_rgb('#4ECDC4')

FONT_PRIMARY = 'Aptos'
FONT_SECONDARY = 'Calibri'
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(2.8)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.5)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.3)


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    bg_color = hex_to_rgb(color_hex) if isinstance(color_hex, str) else color_hex
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color


def add_text_box(slide, x, y, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    if color_hex is None:
        color_hex = WHITE
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex) if isinstance(color_hex, str) else color_hex
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, width, height, title, body=None, bg_color='#121E33', border_color='#00D4FF'):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     title, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex='#00D4FF')
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.6), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.75),
                     body, font_size=11, color_hex='#B0C4DE')
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, label_text):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.35), Inches(0.6), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_BLUE
    line.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, x, y, Inches(4), Inches(0.3), label_text, font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex='#00D4FF')


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=20):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(7.1), Inches(2), Inches(0.3),
                 f'{page_num} / {total_pages}', font_size=9, color_hex='#B0C4DE', alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb('#121E33')
        shape.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_BLUE
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.4), width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.3),
                     '画像プレースホルダー', font_size=11, color_hex='#B0C4DE', alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_decorative_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2, color_hex='#00D4FF'):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x1, y1, x2 - x1, Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_circle_shape(slide, cx, cy, radius, fill_color='#0A1628', border_color='#00D4FF'):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, cx - Inches(radius), cy - Inches(radius),
                                   Inches(radius * 2), Inches(radius * 2))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(fill_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from lxml import etree as OxmlElement


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

NAVY = "#0A1628"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
GOLD = "#C9A227"
LIGHT_GRAY = "#F4F4F4"
CHARCOAL = "#1A1A1A"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, x, y, w, h, text, font_size=18, bold=False,
                 color=CHARCOAL, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, w, h)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, w, h, fill_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(fill_color)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, width, height, label_text, accent_color=GOLD):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.15), width, Inches(0.04))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y + Inches(0.28), width, height)
    tf = label_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = label_text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(11)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    run.font.name = "Calibri"


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, w, h):
    import os
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, w, h)
        return

    placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    placeholder.fill.solid()
    placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GRAY)
    placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    icon_size = Inches(0.6)
    cx = x + (w - icon_size) / 2
    cy = y + (h - icon_size) / 2
    line1 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, cx, cy, icon_size, Pt(3))
    line1.fill.solid()
    line1.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    line1.line.fill.background()

    line2 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, cx + icon_size / 2 - Pt(1.5), cy, Pt(3), icon_size)
    line2.fill.solid()
    line2.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    line2.line.fill.background()


def add_footer_bar(slide, slide_num, total=5):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NAVY)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    page_text = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(6.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(3), Inches(0.35))
    tf = page_text.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{slide_num} / {total}"
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD)
    run.font.name = "Calibri"

FONT_SIZE_HUGE = 60

MARGIN_LEFT = 0.75
MARGIN_RIGHT = 0.75
CARD_WIDTH = 3.5
CARD_HEIGHT = 2.8
CARD_GAP = 0.3


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=BG_COLOR_HEX):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex=WHITE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text, body_text="", accent_color_hex=ACCENT_TEAL_HEX):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BG_HEX)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color_hex)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title_text
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_HEADING)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color_hex)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    if body_text:
        body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.85), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(1.0))
        tf_body = body_box.text_frame
        p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
        run_body = p_body.add_run()
        run_body.text = body_text
        run_body.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_BODY)
        run_body.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)
        run_body.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left=MARGIN_LEFT, top=0.5):
    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(8), Inches(0.4))
    tf = label_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_SECTION)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_footer(slide, page_number=1, total_pages=6):
    footer_text = f"{page_number} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 2.0), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 0.45), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3),
                 footer_text, font_size=12, color_hex=LIGHT_GREY_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BG_HEX)
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height / 2 - 0.2), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "IMAGE PLACEHOLDER"
        run.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_SMALL)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_accent_line(slide, left, top, width, color_hex=ACCENT_TEAL_HEX):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.06))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    line_shape.line.fill.background()


def add_bullet_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, title, bullets):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_HEADING)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    for bullet in bullets:
        p_bullet = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_bullet = p_bullet.add_run()
        run_bullet.text = f"• {bullet}"
        run_bullet.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_BODY)
        run_bullet.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)
        run_bullet.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    return txBox

def slide_04_market(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_COLOR_HEX)

    add_section_label(slide, "MARKET OPPORTUNITY")
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = "A $180B Global Market"
    run_title.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_TITLE)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE_HEX)
    run_title.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(1.75), Inches(2.0))

    market_stats = [
        ("$180B", "Total Addressable\nMarket (TAM)", ACCENT_TEAL_HEX),
        ("$42B", "Serviceable Market\n(SAM)", ACCENT_GREEN_HEX),
        ("$3.5B", "Obtainable Market\n(SOM)", MUTED_GOLD_HEX)
    ]

    for i, (value, label, color) in enumerate(market_stats):
        x_pos = Inches(MARGIN_LEFT + i * 4.0)
        add_text_box(slide, x_pos, Inches(2.1), Inches(3.5), Inches(1.0), value,
                     font_size=FONT_SIZE_HUGE, bold=True, color_hex=color, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x_pos, Inches(3.1), Inches(3.5), Inches(0.8), label,
                     font_size=FONT_SIZE_HEADING, color_hex=LIGHT_GREY_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2024", "2026", "2028", "2030", "2032"]
    chart_data.add_series("Market Size ($B)", (15.2, 28.7, 45.3, 68.9, 92.1))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(4.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(3.0),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_TEAL_HEX)

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Market Size ($B)"
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_SMALL)
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(FONT_SIZE_SMALL)
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY_HEX)

    add_footer(slide, 4, 6)

def main():

    prs.slide_width = Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH)
    prs.slide_height = Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT)

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_problem(prs)
    slide_03_solution(prs)
    slide_04_market(prs)
    slide_05_business(prs)

    prs.save("BioTech_Pitch.pptx")

Create a robust PowerPoint presentation for project stakeholders in the Construction industry updating them on our infrastructure development timeline, containing exactly 18 slides with an industrial theme using orange, dark gray, and concrete beige colors. The output filename must be "Infrastructure_Development.pptx". Write all presentation content in English and use 16:9 Widescreen orientation. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs or web scraping; generate all data locally based on standard construction project milestones. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.DOUGHNUT`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# Slide dimensions (16:9 widescreen)
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

# Color palette
ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6B, 0x35)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x2D, 0x2D)
CONCRETE_BEIGE = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xE0, 0xD4)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xF3, 0xED)
OFF_WHITE = RGBColor(0xFA, 0xF9, 0xF7)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6B, 0x6B, 0x6B)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xD4, 0xD4, 0xD4)

# Typography constants
TITLE_FONT_SIZE = Pt(32)
SUBTITLE_FONT_SIZE = Pt(18)
BODY_FONT_SIZE = Pt(14)
CARD_TITLE_FONT_SIZE = Pt(16)
SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE = Pt(12)
SECTION_LABEL_FONT_SIZE = Pt(10)

# Layout constants
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.8)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(3.5)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(2.0)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.15)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    """Convert hex color string to RGBColor."""
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip('#')
    return RGBColor(int(hex_color[0:2], 16), int(hex_color[2:4], 16), int(hex_color[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    """Set the background fill of a slide."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=BODY_FONT_SIZE,
                 font_color=DARK_GRAY, bold=False, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT,
                 font_name='Calibri', line_spacing=None):
    """Add a formatted text box to the slide."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = font_size
    p.font.color.rgb = font_color
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    if line_spacing:
        p.line_spacing = line_spacing
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body_text=None,
             accent_color=ORANGE):
    """Add a styled card with optional title and body text."""
    # Card background
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    # Accent bar on the left edge
    accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top + Inches(0.2),
                                        Inches(0.08), height - Inches(0.4))
    accent_bar.fill.solid()
    accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = accent_color

    # Title
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.35), top + Inches(0.25), width - Inches(0.6),
                     Inches(0.4), title, CARD_TITLE_FONT_SIZE, DARK_GRAY, True)

    # Body text
    if body_text:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.35), top + Inches(0.75), width - Inches(0.6),
                     height - Inches(1.0), body_text, BODY_FONT_SIZE, MEDIUM_GRAY)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    """Add a section label at the top of a content slide."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.35), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.4),
                 text, SECTION_LABEL_FONT_SIZE, ORANGE, True)


def add_footer(slide, page_num):
    """Add footer with company name and page number."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.3),
                 'Apex Infrastructure Group', SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(2), Inches(7.1), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3),
                 f'Page {page_num}', SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE, LIGHT_GRAY, False, PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, alt_text='Image'):
    """Add an image if path exists, otherwise a styled placeholder."""
    img_path = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), 'assets', alt_text.lower().replace(' ', '_') + '.png')
    if os.path.exists(img_path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(img_path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_ORANGE
        shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height / 2 - Inches(0.15)),
                     width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), alt_text, SMALL_TEXT_FONT_SIZE,
                     ORANGE, False, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def create_doughnut_chart(slide, left, top, width, height, title, categories, values):
    """Create a doughnut chart showing project metrics."""
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories
    chart_data.add_series('Progress', values)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.DOUGHNUT, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(12)
    data_labels.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
    data_labels.number_format = '0%'

    # Style the first slice (orange) and rest (light gray)
    series = plot.series[0]
    for i, point in enumerate(series.points):
        if i == 0:
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
        else:
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    # Chart title
    chart.has_title = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = title
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(14)
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    return chart_frame


def create_bar_chart(slide, left, top, width, height, title, categories, values):
    """Create a clustered column bar chart for budget data."""
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories
    chart_data.add_series('Budget Allocation ($M)', values)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    for point in series.points:
        point.format.fill.solid()
        point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE

    chart.has_legend = False
    chart.has_title = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = title
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(14)
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY

    return chart_frame

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PALETTE = {
    "ocean_blue": RGBColor(0x0B, 0x3D, 0x91),
    "seafoam_green": RGBColor(0x2E, 0xCC, 0x71),
    "sand_beige": RGBColor(0xF4, 0xE8, 0xC1),
    "coral_accent": RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6B, 0x6B),
    "earth_brown": RGBColor(0x3E, 0x27, 0x23),
    "white": RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF),
    "light_green": RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9),
    "dark_blue": RGBColor(0x1A, 0x23, 0x7E),
}

FONT_TITLE = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color_hex="#333333", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_TITLE
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color="#FFFFFF", border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), height * 0.35)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title
    run.font.size = Pt(16)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#3E2723")

    txBox2 = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.4), height * 0.5)
    tf2 = txBox2.text_frame
    tf2.word_wrap = True
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = body
    run2.font.size = Pt(12)
    run2.font.name = FONT_BODY
    run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#555555")

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, position="top"):
    if position == "top":
        banner = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.2))
        banner.fill.solid()
        banner.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["ocean_blue"]
        banner.line.fill.background()

        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.6))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = label_text
        run.font.size = Pt(28)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.name = FONT_TITLE
        run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["white"]


def add_footer(slide, text="Ocean Cleanup Initiative | Iniciativa Ambiental"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(12), Inches(0.4))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#888888")


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#E0E0E0")
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#BDBDBD")
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1)

        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "[Imagem]"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#9E9E9E")


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.left = Inches(0)
        title_shape.top = Inches(0)
        title_shape.width = SLIDE_WIDTH
        title_shape.height = Inches(7.5)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1), Inches(2.0), Inches(11), Inches(1.5), "Ocean Cleanup Initiative", 48, True, "#0B3D91", PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1), Inches(3.6), Inches(11), Inches(1.2), "Protegendo nossos oceanos para as gerações futuras", 24, False, "#555555", PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    wave = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(-1), Inches(5.8), SLIDE_WIDTH + Inches(2), Inches(3))
    wave.fill.solid()
    wave.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["seafoam_green"]
    wave.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1), Inches(1.6), Inches(11), Inches(1.2), "Trabalhamos incansavelmente para restaurar a saúde dos oceanos através de ações concretas e colaboração global.", 18, False, "#3E2723", PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    pillars = [
        ("Reduzir", "Diminuir o fluxo de plástico nos oceanos através de políticas públicas e conscientização."),
        ("Restaurar", "Recuperar ecossistemas marinhos degradados com projetos de reflorestamento costeiro."),
        ("Reconstruir", "Criar comunidades costeiras resilientes e sustentáveis para as próximas gerações.")
    ]

    card_width = Inches(3.5)

    for i, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(pillars):

def slide_03_impact(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.left = Inches(0)
        title_shape.top = Inches(0)
        title_shape.width = SLIDE_WIDTH
        title_shape.height = Inches(7.5)

    add_section_label(slide, "Nosso Impacto")

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2018", "2019", "2020", "2021", "2022", "2023"]
    chart_data.add_series("Poluição Plástica (milhões de toneladas)", (7.5, 7.8, 8.0, 8.1, 8.3, 8.5))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(0.6), Inches(1.4), Inches(6.5), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["ocean_blue"]

    value_labels = series.data_labels
    value_labels.number_format = "0.0"
    value_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    value_labels.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["earth_brown"]

    stats = [
        ("8 Milhões", "Toneladas de plástico nos oceanos por ano"),
        ("250 Mil", "Quilômetros quadrados de áreas marinhas protegidas"),
        ("1.2 Milhão", "Voluntários engajados em todo o mundo"),
        ("45 Países", "Presença ativa em projetos de limpeza")
    ]

    stat_width = Inches(3.0)
    stat_height = Inches(1.2)
    start_x = Inches(7.8)
    y_start = Inches(1.6)

    for i, (number, description) in enumerate(stats):
        x = start_x
        y = y_start + i * (stat_height + Inches(0.15))
        card = add_card(slide, x, y, stat_width, stat_height, number, description, "#E3F2FD", "#0B3D91")

    add_footer(slide)

def slide_05_donate(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    for i, (amount, impact) in enumerate(tiers):

        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, Inches(2.5), amount, impact, bg, border)

    cta_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(4.0), Inches(5.6), Inches(5.3), Inches(1.0))
    cta_shape.fill.solid()

    cta_shape.line.fill.background()

    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.2), Inches(5.75), Inches(4.9), Inches(0.7))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "DOE AGORA"
    run.font.size = Pt(22)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE
    run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["white"]

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_06_contact(prs):
