import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData


# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.3)

PALETTE = {
    "deep_purple": "#4A0E8F",
    "magenta":     "#FF2D9B",
    "coral":       "#FF6B6B",
    "gold":        "#FFC107",
    "teal":        "#00BCD4",
    "white":       "#FFFFFF",
    "dark_navy":   "#1A1A2E",
    "light_gray":  "#F5F5F5",
    "medium_gray": "#CCCCCC",
}

FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_HEADING = "Arial"


# ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex="#FFFFFF", alignment=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING if bold else FONT_BODY
    if alignment is not None:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color_hex="#1A1A2E", border_color_hex=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color_hex)
    if border_color_hex:
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color_hex)
        line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title
    run.font.size = Pt(16)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold"])
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        run2 = p2.add_run()
        run2.text = body
        run2.font.size = Pt(13)
        run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["white"])
        run2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, font_size=28, color_hex="#FFC107"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    footer_text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.35),
        footer_text, font_size=10, color_hex="#CCCCCC", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, label="Imagen"):
    path = os.path.join(os.getcwd(), "assets", label.replace(" ", "_").lower() + ".jpg")
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#2A2A4E")
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["magenta"])
        shape.line.width = Pt(3)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(
            left + Inches(0.15), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4)
        )
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"📷 {label}"
        run.font.size = Pt(16)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["white"])
        run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_decorative_circle(slide, left, top, size, color_hex):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()


def safe_set_title(slide, text):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = text
    else:
        add_text_box(
            slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3), Inches(11.7), Inches(0.6),
            text, font_size=24, bold=True, color_hex="#FFFFFF"
        )

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(8)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(6)

GREEN = RGBColor(46, 204, 113)
YELLOW = RGBColor(241, 196, 15)
BLUE = RGBColor(52, 152, 219)
DARK_BLUE = RGBColor(44, 62, 80)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(236, 240, 241)
ORANGE = RGBColor(243, 156, 18)
PURPLE = RGBColor(155, 89, 182)

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=DARK_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p0 = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p0.text = title
    p0.font.size = Pt(14)
    p0.font.bold = True
    p0.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
    p0.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body:
        p1 = tf.add_paragraph()
        p1.text = body
        p1.font.size = Pt(11)
        p1.font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
        p1.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.25), Inches(6.8), Inches(0.4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = BLUE
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.9), Inches(1.27), Inches(6.2), Inches(0.35), text, font_size=18, bold=True, color=WHITE)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=10):
    footer = add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(5.7), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.3), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=9, color=DARK_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = BLUE
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = alt_text
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.color.rgb = BLUE


def add_circle(slide, left, top, size, color):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


# ─── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F0FFF4")

    add_circle(slide, Inches(-1), Inches(-1), Inches(3.5), GREEN)
    add_circle(slide, Inches(7), Inches(4.5), Inches(2.8), YELLOW)
    add_circle(slide, Inches(6.5), Inches(-0.5), Inches(1.8), BLUE)

    title_box = slide.shapes.title
    if title_box is not None:
        title_box.text = "Welcome to Biology!"
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(44)
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_BLUE
        title_box.text_frame.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    subtitle = add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.6), "Explore the Amazing World of Living Things", font_size=22, color=BLUE)
    subtitle.text_frame.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.4), "A Fun Journey Through Cells, Plants, Animals & More!", font_size=16, color=DARK_BLUE)
    add_footer(slide, 1)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.4), Inches(6.4), Inches(0.3), "Great job! Keep exploring the world of biology!", font_size=14, bold=True, color=BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_footer(slide, 10)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_what_is_biology(prs)
    build_cell_slide(prs)

    build_classification_slide(prs)
    build_ecosystems_slide(prs)
    build_body_systems_slide(prs)
    build_evolution_slide(prs)
    build_summary_slide(prs)

    prs.save("Biology_Lesson.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# --- Constants ---
OUTPUT_FILE = "Crop_Yield_Report.pptx"
SLIDE_WIDTH_IN = 10.0
SLIDE_HEIGHT_IN = 7.5
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH_IN - MARGIN_LEFT.inches * 2

PALETTE = {
    "dark_green": "#2E5939",
    "medium_green": "#4A7C59",
    "light_green": "#8FBF8F",
    "brown": "#6B4226",
    "gold_brown": "#8B6914",
    "beige": "#D4C5A9",
    "cream": "#F5F0E8",
    "white": "#FFFFFF",
    "dark_text": "#333333",
}

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color_hex=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color_hex:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_text"])
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    if bg_color is None:
        bg_color = PALETTE["cream"]
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title
    run.font.size = Pt(14)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_green"])
    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        run2 = p2.add_run()
        run2.text = body
        run2.font.size = Pt(11)
        run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_text"])
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    label_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.35), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    label_shape.fill.solid()
    label_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["medium_green"])
    label_shape.line.fill.background()
    tf = label_shape.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(12)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["cream"])


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    footer_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    footer_bar.fill.solid()
    footer_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["dark_green"])
    footer_bar.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.15), Inches(7.08), Inches(3), Inches(0.25), "Farm Cooperative Alliance", font_size=9, color_hex=PALETTE["cream"])
    add_text_box(slide, slide.shapes[-1].left + Inches(6.5), Inches(7.08), Inches(3), Inches(0.25), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT, color_hex=PALETTE["cream"])


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["beige"])
        ph.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["brown"])
        ph.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6), "Image Placeholder", font_size=11, color_hex=PALETTE["brown"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(4.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.5), "Farm Cooperative Alliance — 2024 Season", font_size=16, color_hex=PALETTE["light_green"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.5), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.4), "Prepared for Board of Directors & Cooperative Members", font_size=12, color_hex=PALETTE["beige"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    kpi_data = [

    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.0)

def add_card(slide, x, y, width, height, title_text="", body_text="", bg_color=CARD_BG_HEX, border_color=BLUE_HEX):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
    card_shape.fill.solid()
    card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    card_shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    card_shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    if title_text:
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     title_text, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex=BLUE_HEX)

    if body_text:
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7),
                     body_text, font_size=11, bold=False, color_hex=LIGHT_GRAY_HEX)

    return card_shape


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, label_text):
    add_text_box(slide, x, y, Inches(4), Inches(0.35), label_text,
                 font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex=PURPLE_HEX, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=TOTAL_SLIDES):
    footer_text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.3),
                 footer_text, font_size=9, bold=False, color_hex="#4A5568", alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BG_HEX)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)


def add_circle_indicator(slide, x, y, size, color_hex):
    circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, y, size, size)
    circle.fill.solid()
    circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    circle.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
    circle.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    return circle


def add_diagonal_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2):
    connector = slide.shapes.add_connector(1, x1, y1, x2, y2)
    connector.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLUE_HEX)
    connector.line.width = Pt(2)


def add_title_text(slide, text, font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE_HEX):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        run = title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run()
        run.text = text
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.bold = bold
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(0.5), Inches(11.33), Inches(1.2),
                     text, font_size=font_size, bold=bold, color_hex=color_hex)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    hex_str = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_str[0:2], 16), int(hex_str[2:4], 16), int(hex_str[4:6], 16))


SLIDE_WIDTH_IN = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT_IN = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_BLUE = hex_to_rgb("#1E3A5F")
ACCENT_YELLOW = hex_to_rgb("#FFD700")
WHITE = hex_to_rgb("#FFFFFF")
LIGHT_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#F5F5F5")
DARK_TEXT = hex_to_rgb("#333333")
MEDIUM_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#666666")
LIGHT_BLUE_BG = hex_to_rgb("#E8EEF4")

FONT_HEADING = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
TITLE_SIZE = Pt(32)
SUBTITLE_SIZE = Pt(18)
BODY_SIZE = Pt(14)
CARD_TITLE_SIZE = Pt(16)
SMALL_TEXT_SIZE = Pt(12)


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    if isinstance(color_hex, RGBColor):
        color = color_hex
    else:
        color = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=BODY_SIZE, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = font_size
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=WHITE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D0D5DD")
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title
    run_title.font.size = CARD_TITLE_SIZE
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_body = p_body.add_run()
    run_body.text = body
    run_body.font.size = BODY_SIZE
    run_body.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
    run_body.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.8), y_position, Inches(11.73), Inches(0.5))
    tf = label_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(24)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.8), Inches(7.0), Inches(11.73), Inches(0.4))
    tf = footer_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"Inventarverwaltungssystem  |  Seite {page_number}"
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D0D5DD")
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)

def build_process_flow(prs):
    slide_layout = prs.slide_layouts[5]

    accent_line.line.fill.background()

    steps = [
        ("Wareneingang", "Lieferung prüfen\nund einlagern"),

        ("Versand", "Ausgangskontrolle\nund Versand"),
    ]

    for i, (step_title, step_desc) in enumerate(steps):
        x_pos = Inches(0.5 + i * 2.6)

        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x_pos, y_pos, Inches(1.4), Inches(1.4))

        circle.line.fill.background()

        num_box = add_text_box(slide, x_pos + Inches(0.4), y_pos + Inches(0.35), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7), str(i + 1), Pt(28), True, WHITE, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        desc_box_s = add_text_box(slide, x_pos - Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(2.05), Inches(1.8), Inches(1.2), step_desc, SMALL_TEXT_SIZE, False, DARK_TEXT, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    for i in range(len(steps) - 1):
        arrow_x = Inches(1.9 + i * 2.6)
        arrow_y = Inches(2.45)
        arrow_w = Inches(0.7)
        arrow_h = Inches(0.3)
        arrow = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, arrow_x, arrow_y, arrow_w, arrow_h)
        arrow.fill.solid()
        arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#95A5A6")

    add_footer(slide, 6)

Create a digital marketing brand audit presentation for our clients. The file should be saved as 'Brand_Audit_2023.pptx', all content must be in French, and the slides should be 16:9 Widescreen landscape. Apply a vibrant creative style with gradient backgrounds and bold sans-serif fonts. You are strictly forbidden from using external APIs or web scraping; provide all mock data directly in your code. Ensure that any chart creation uses XL_CHART_TYPE instead of ChartType. It is also mandatory to check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing its .text property.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Brand_Audit_2023.pptx"

# Vibrant creative palette
COLOR_PRIMARY = RGBColor(0xE8, 0x43, 0x93)   # magenta
COLOR_SECONDARY = RGBColor(0x6C, 0x5C, 0xE7)  # purple
COLOR_ACCENT = RGBColor(0x00, 0xB8, 0x94)     # teal
COLOR_DARK = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x34, 0x36)       # near-black
COLOR_LIGHT = RGBColor(0xFD, 0xFE, 0xFE)      # off-white
COLOR_CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_GRADIENT_1 = RGBColor(0xFD, 0x79, 0xA8)
COLOR_GRADIENT_2 = RGBColor(0xA2, 0x9B, 0xFE)

FONT_HEADING = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(prs, slide):
    """Fill the entire slide with a solid background color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=None):
    """Add a text box with optional styling."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    if alignment is not None:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    """Add a rounded-rectangle card with title and body text."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color or COLOR_CARD_BG
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.2)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.2)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.15)

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p_title.text = title
    run_t = p_title.runs[0] if p_title.runs else p_title.add_run()
    run_t.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    run_t.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK

    if body:
        p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
        p_body.text = body
        run_b = p_body.runs[0] if p_body.runs else p_body.add_run()
        run_b.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY
        run_b.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0x63, 0x6E, 0x72)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, left, top, width, height, bg_color=None):
    """Add a small colored section label / tag."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color or COLOR_SECONDARY
    shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT
    run.text = label_text

    return shape


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=6):
    """Add a small centered footer with page number."""
    text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(
        slide,

def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import ChartData


# ── Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x0A, 0x19, 0x2F)
SECONDARY = RGBColor(0x1E, 0x3A, 0x5F)
ACCENT = RGBColor(0x00, 0xB4, 0xD8)
HIGHLIGHT = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6B, 0x35)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF0, 0xF4, 0xF8)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x1A, 0x1A, 0x2E)
MID_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6C, 0x75, 0x7D)

FONT_TITLE = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
BOTTOM_MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.3)


# ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    """Fill the entire slide with a solid background colour."""
    bg_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, SLIDE_HEIGHT)
    bg_shape.fill.solid()
    bg_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    bg_shape.line.fill.background()


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=WHITE, alignment=None):
    """Create a text box with optional alignment."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment or PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_TITLE
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY):
    """Rounded card with title and body text."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xDD, 0xDD, 0xDD)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title
    run.font.size = Pt(16)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.7), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.85))
    tf2 = body_box.text_frame
    tf2.word_wrap = True
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = body
    run2.font.size = Pt(13)
    run2.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
    run2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    """Small accent bar + label for section headers."""
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, LEFT_MARGIN, y_position, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, LEFT_MARGIN + Inches(0.3), y_position - Inches(0.02), Inches(6), Inches(0.5), text, font_size=14, bold=True, color=ACCENT)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    """Footer with presentation name and page number."""
    left_text = "Cloud-Migrationsstrategie"
    right_text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"

    add_text_box(slide, LEFT_MARGIN, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.35), Inches(4), Inches(0.25), left_text, font_size=10, color=MID_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - RIGHT_MARGIN - Inches(2), SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.35), Inches(2), Inches(0.25), right_text, font_size=10, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Insert image if file exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEC, 0xF1)
        ph.line.color.rgb = ACCENT
        ph.line.width = Pt(2)

        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Bild-Platzhalter"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = MID_GRAY


def add_accent_circle(slide, cx, cy, radius):
    """Decorative semi-transparent circle."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, cx - radius, cy - radius, radius * 2, radius * 2)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT
    shape.line.fill.background()
    # Set transparency via alpha (pptx doesn't expose alpha directly; use fill.transparency if available)
    try:
        shape.fill.fore_color.alpha = 30000  # ~30% opacity
    except Exception:
        pass


def add_gradient_overlay(slide, left, top, width, height, color1, color2):
    """Layer two semi-transparent rectangles to simulate a gradient overlay."""
    r1 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    r1.fill.solid()
    r1.fill.fore_color.rgb = color1
    try:
        r1.fill.fore_color.alpha = 40000
    except Exception:
        pass
    r1.line.fill.background()

    r2 = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + width / 2, top, width / 2, height)
    r2.fill.solid()
    r2.fill.fore_color.rgb = color2
    try:
        r2.fill.fore_color.alpha = 40000
    except Exception:
        pass
    r2.line.fill.background()


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

def title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY)

    # Gradient overlay
    add_gradient_overlay(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, SLIDE_HEIGHT, ACCENT, SECONDARY)

    # Decorative circles
    add_accent_circle(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.5), Inches(1.8))
    add_accent_circle(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(5.0), Inches(1.2))

    # Title
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.5))
    tf = title_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Cloud-Migrationsstrategie"
    run.font.size = Pt(48)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = WHITE

    line_shape.fill.solid()

    # Contact placeholder

    run3.text = "Kontakt: cloud-migration@unternehmen.de | +49 30 12345678"
    run3.font.size = Pt(14)
    run3.font.color.rgb = MID_GRAY
    run3.font.name = FONT_BODY

    add_footer(slide, 14, 14)


# ── Main ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    # Set widescreen dimensions (16:9)
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    builders = [
        title_slide,
        agenda_slide,
        drivers_slide,
        challenges_slide,
        phases_slide,
        architecture_slide,
        security_slide,
        cost_analysis_slide,
        roadmap_slide,
        team_slide,
        risk_slide,
        kpi_slide,
        next_steps_slide,
        closing_slide,
    ]

    for builder in builders:
        builder(prs)

    prs.save("Cloud_Migration.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

Design a strategy consulting market entry presentation targeting C-Suite executives. Name the file 'Market_Entry_Strategy.pptx', write in English, and set slides to 16:9 Widescreen landscape. The visual theme should be sleek corporate navy and silver with modern layout structures. You must not use external APIs or web scraping; rely exclusively on hardcoded mock data within your code. from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE, XL_MARKER_STYLE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

NAVY = RGBColor(10, 31, 68)
SILVER = RGBColor(192, 197, 206)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_BLUE = RGBColor(59, 130, 246)
ACCENT_GOLD = RGBColor(212, 175, 55)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(30, 41, 59)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(248, 250, 252)
MID_BLUE = RGBColor(30, 64, 175)

FONT_TITLE = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.4)
BOTTOM_MARGIN = Inches(0.3)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.15)


# ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color=DARK_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if font_size < 24 else FONT_TITLE
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=NAVY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title:
        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = title
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = NAVY
        run.font.name = FONT_TITLE
        if body:
            p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
            p2.space_before = Pt(6)
            run2 = p2.add_run()
            run2.text = body
            run2.font.size = Pt(11)
            run2.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
            run2.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, label_text):
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.35), label_text, font_size=10, bold=True, color=SILVER)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(11.2), Inches(6.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3),
                 f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=SILVER, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(230, 235, 245)
        shape.line.color.rgb = SILVER
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.1), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.2),
                     "Image Placeholder", font_size=10, color=SILVER, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ────────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A1F44")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(7.5), Inches(1.2),
                 "Market Entry Strategy", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.0), Inches(3.1), Inches(6.5), Inches(0.6),
                 "Strategic Analysis & Recommendations for Global Expansion", font_size=20, color=SILVER)

    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(4.5), Inches(3.9), Inches(3.5), Pt(2))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(4.0), Inches(6.0), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.4),
                 "CONFIDENTIAL — Prepared for C-Suite Review", font_size=12, color=SILVER, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        # Value text on top of card

    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.6), Inches(3.7), Inches(5.2), Inches(2.8))

    tf2.word_wrap = True
    for i, line in enumerate(right_col):
        p = tf2.paragraphs[0] if i == 0 else tf2.add_paragraph()
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = line

    add_footer(slide, 2, 6)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

COLOR_NAVY = RGBColor(27, 42, 74)
COLOR_TEAL = RGBColor(13, 148, 136)
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(241, 245, 249)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(30, 41, 59)
COLOR_MUTED_TEXT = RGBColor(100, 116, 139)
COLOR_CARD_BG = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_ACCENT_BAR = RGBColor(13, 148, 136)

FONT_HEADING = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


# ── Helper Functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    """Fill the entire slide with a solid background color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color_hex


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    """Create a text box with specified formatting."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    """Create a rounded rectangle card with title and body text."""
    if bg_color is None:
        bg_color = COLOR_CARD_BG
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.2)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.2)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.15)

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_title.add_run()
    run_t.text = title
    run_t.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body:
        p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_b = p_body.add_run()
        run_b.text = body
        run_b.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_b.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=18):
    """Add a small section header label."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(6), Inches(0.5))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=8):
    """Add a footer with confidentiality notice."""
    left = Inches(0.6)
    top = Inches(7.0)
    width = Inches(8.8)
    height = Inches(0.35)

    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"CONFIDENTIAL | Internal Use Only  •  Slide {slide_num} of {total}"
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Insert image if file exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(203, 213, 225)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "[Image Placeholder]"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
        run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_arrow(slide, left, top, width, height):
    """Add a right-pointing arrow shape."""
    return slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, left, top, width, height)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    """Slide 2 — Executive Summary: Key Metrics Overview"""
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY)

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Executive Summary")

    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "", font_size=24)

    add_text_box(

    )

    # Four metric cards in 2x2 grid
    card_w = Inches(3.6)
    card_h = Inches(1.8)
    gap_x = Inches(0.5)
    gap_y = Inches(0.4)

    ]

    positions = [

        (start_left, row2_top),
        (start_left + card_w + gap_x, row2_top),
    ]

    for i, ((title, body)) in enumerate(metrics):
        left, top = positions[i]

        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top_y, card_w, card_h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(203, 213, 225)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        tf.margin_left = Inches(0.2)
        tf.margin_right = Inches(0.2)
        tf.margin_top = Inches(0.2)

        p_phase = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_p = p_phase.add_run()
        run_p.text = phase
        run_p.font.size = Pt(16)
        run_p.font.bold = True
        run_p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
        run_p.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        p_time = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_t = p_time.add_run()
        run_t.text = timeline
        run_t.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_t.font.bold = True
        run_t.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_TEXT
        run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

        p_details = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_d = p_details.add_run()
        run_d.text = details
        run_d.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_d.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_TEXT
        run_d.font.name = FONT_BODY

        # Arrow between phases (not after last one)
        if i < len(phases) - 1:
            arrow_left = left + card_w
            arrow = add_arrow(slide, arrow_left, top_y + Inches(1.3), Inches(0.45), Inches(0.4))
            arrow.fill.solid()
            arrow.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
            arrow.line.fill.background()

    # Call-to-action at bottom
    cta_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(2.5), Inches(5.3), Inches(5), Inches(0.7))
    cta_shape.fill.solid()
    cta_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL
    cta_shape.line.fill.background()

    tf_cta = cta_shape.text_frame
    p_cta = tf_cta.paragraphs[0]
    p_cta.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run_cta = p_cta.add_run()
    run_cta.text = "Next Review Meeting: October 15, 2025"
    run_cta.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_cta.font.bold = True
    run_cta.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    run_cta.font.name = FONT_HEADING


# ── Main ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_journey_map(prs)
    slide_04_admission_analysis(prs)
    slide_05_wait_time(prs)
    slide_06_dept_performance(prs)
    slide_07_bottlenecks(prs)
    slide_08_timeline(prs)

    prs.save("Patient_Flow.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os

# --- Deck Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(8)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(6)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Data_Science_101.pptx"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)

# Color palette — vibrant educational colors
COLOR_PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x25, 0x63, 0xEB)       # Blue
COLOR_SECONDARY = RGBColor(0x7C, 0x3A, 0xED)      # Purple
COLOR_SUCCESS = RGBColor(0x10, 0xB9, 0x81)         # Green
COLOR_WARNING = RGBColor(0xF5, 0x9E, 0x0B)         # Orange
COLOR_DANGER = RGBColor(0xEF, 0x44, 0x44)          # Red
COLOR_TEAL = RGBColor(0x14, 0xB8, 0xA6)            # Teal
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF3, 0xF4, 0xF6)
COLOR_DARK = RGBColor(0x1F, 0x29, 0x37)
COLOR_MID_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6B, 0x72, 0x80)

# Fonts
FONT_TITLE = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"

# --- Helper Functions ---

def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    """Convert a hex color string to RGBColor."""
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, bg_hex):
    """Set the background fill of a slide."""
    from pptx.oxml.ns import qn
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    """Add a text box to the slide."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, icon_char="◆", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE):
    """Add a styled card with title, body text, and an icon placeholder."""
    # Card background
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    # Icon placeholder (circle with character)
    icon_size = Inches(0.45)
    icon_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + Inches(0.12), top + Inches(0.12), icon_size, icon_size)
    icon_shape.fill.solid()
    icon_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    icon_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)

    # Title
    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.6), top + Inches(0.12), width - Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = icon_char + "  " + title
    run_title.font.size = Pt(12)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    # Body text
    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.6), top + Inches(0.45), width - Inches(0.8), height - Inches(0.5))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_body = p_body.add_run()
    run_body.text = body
    run_body.font.size = Pt(10)
    run_body.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    """Add a decorative section label with underline."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position, Inches(7), Inches(0.35), text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position + Inches(0.32), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    """Add a footer with slide number."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.6), Inches(7), Inches(0.25), f"Page {page_number}", font_size=9, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, label):
    """Add an image if it exists, otherwise a styled placeholder."""
    # Placeholder rectangle with icon and label
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xD1, 0xD5, 0xDB)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    # Icon placeholder (circle with plus sign)
    icon_size = Inches(0.6)
    icon_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + (width - icon_size) / 2, top + Inches(0.3), icon_size, icon_size)
    icon_shape.fill.solid()
    icon_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    icon_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xD1, 0xD5, 0xDB)

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + height - Inches(0.35), width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.25), label, font_size=8, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_icon_circle(slide, left, top, size, char, bg_color):
    """Add a colored circle with an icon character."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.05), top + Inches(0.08), size - Inches(0.1), size - Inches(0.16), char, font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_numbered_step(slide, left, top, width, height, number, title_text, body_text):
    """Add a numbered step card."""
    # Step background
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)

    # Number circle
    num_size = Inches(0.4)
    num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.1), num_size, num_size)
    num_shape.fill.solid()
    num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PRIMARY
    num_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.12), top + Inches(0.13), num_size - Inches(0.04), num_size - Inches(0.06), str(number), font_size=14, bold=True, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Title
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.55), top + Inches(0.1), width - Inches(0.7), Inches(0.25), title_text, font_size=11, bold=True, color=COLOR_DARK)

    # Body
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.55), top + Inches(0.38), width - Inches(0.7), height - Inches(0.45), body_text, font_size=9, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY)


# --- Slide Builder Functions ---

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

COLORS = {
    "coral": RGBColor(255, 107, 107),
    "teal": RGBColor(78, 205, 196),
    "yellow": RGBColor(255, 230, 109),
    "purple": RGBColor(155, 93, 229),
    "green": RGBColor(0, 245, 212),
    "pink": RGBColor(241, 91, 181),
    "navy": RGBColor(44, 62, 80),
    "white": RGBColor(255, 255, 255),
    "light_gray": RGBColor(245, 245, 245),
    "dark_bg": RGBColor(30, 40, 60),
}

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_PRIMARY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = font_name
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    card_bg = bg_color or COLORS["white"]
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = card_bg
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.25), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.7))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title
    run_title.font.size = Pt(18)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY
    run_title.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(1.0), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(1.2))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_body = p_body.add_run()
    run_body.text = body
    run_body.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_body.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    run_body.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, y_position):
    box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(0.5), y_position, Inches(3.5), Inches(0.4))
    box.fill.solid()
    box.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLORS["teal"]
    box.line.fill.background()
    tf = box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = label_text
    run.font.size = Pt(12)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["white"]
    run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(8.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.4))
    tf = box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = str(page_number)
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLORS["light_gray"]
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = COLORS["teal"]
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.15), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Zone d'image"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]


def add_decorative_circle(slide, left, top, size, color):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_decorative_star(slide, left, top, size, color):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.STAR_5_POINT, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_banner(slide, text, y_position):
    banner = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CURVED_LEFT_ARROW, Inches(0.5), y_position, Inches(9), Inches(1.2))
    banner.fill.solid()
    banner.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLORS["coral"]
    banner.line.fill.background()
    tf = banner.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(28)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["white"]
    run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY

    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "EdTech Product Demo"

    run.font.color.rgb = COLORS["navy"]

    subtitle_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(2.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.6))
    tf_sub = subtitle_box.text_frame
    p_sub = tf_sub.paragraphs[0]
    run_sub = p_sub.add_run()
    run_sub.text = "Une solution innovante pour les écoles et enseignants"
    run_sub.font.size = Pt(20)
    run_sub.font.color.rgb = COLORS["teal"]

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_2_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.7))

    items = [
        ("1", "Le problème actuel"),

The output file must be named "logistics_supply_chain.pptx" and all content should be in Portuguese. Use the standard 16:9 Widescreen slide size. from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)

PRIMARY_COLOR = RGBColor(10, 38, 71)       # dark navy
SECONDARY_COLOR = RGBColor(30, 136, 229)    # blue
ACCENT_COLOR = RGBColor(255, 193, 7)        # gold
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(240, 240, 240)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(33, 33, 33)
MEDIUM_TEXT = RGBColor(100, 100, 100)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)

FONT_HEADING = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=CARD_BG):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 200, 200)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.12), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4))
    tf_t = title_box.text_frame
    p_t = tf_t.paragraphs[0]
    p_t.text = title
    p_t.font.size = Pt(16)
    p_t.font.bold = True
    p_t.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    p_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.3), height - Inches(0.7))
    tf_b = body_box.text_frame
    tf_b.word_wrap = True
    p_b = tf_b.paragraphs[0]
    p_b.text = body
    p_b.font.size = Pt(12)
    p_b.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
    p_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(1.5), Pt(4))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.2), Inches(0.38), Inches(6), Inches(0.4), text, font_size=14, bold=True, color=SECONDARY_COLOR)


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(10.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.3))
    tf = footer_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = f"Logística & Investimentos | {page_number}"
    p.font.size = Pt(9)
    p.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(150, 150, 150)
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.RIGHT


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(180, 180, 180)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)

        icon_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.25), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5))
        tf_i = icon_box.text_frame
        p_i = tf_i.paragraphs[0]
        p_i.text = "📷"
        p_i.font.size = Pt(36)
        p_i.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


# ── Slide Builders ────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A2647")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(10), Inches(1.2),
                 "Otimização da Cadeia de Suprimentos", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.8),
                 "Estratégias Avançadas para Logística Moderna e Eficiência Operacional",
                 font_size=20, color=RGBColor(174, 213, 255))

    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(3), Pt(4))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.6), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                 "Apresentação para Investidores | Q4 2024", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(174, 213, 255))

    add_footer(slide, "01")


def slide_02_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Sumário"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Sumário", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    items = [
        ("01", "Visão Geral do Mercado"),
        ("02", "Desafios Principais da Logística"),
        ("03", "Soluções Estratégicas"),

        ("06", "Estudos de Caso"),
        ("07", "Roadmap de Implementação"),
        ("08", "Gestão de Riscos e Resumo Financeiro"),
    ]

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(items):
        y = Inches(1.2 + i * 0.65)
        num_box = add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), num, font_size=18, bold=True, color=SECONDARY_COLOR)
        label_box = add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(1.2), y, Inches(6), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=16, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_footer(slide, "02")


def slide_03_market_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Visão Geral do Mercado"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Visão Geral do Mercado", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    stats = [
        ("US$ 8.5 Bi", "Tamanho do Mercado Global"),
        ("12.4%", "Taxa de Crescimento Anual (CAGR)"),
        ("3.2M+", "Empresas Logísticas Ativas"),
        ("67%", "Adoção de IA na Cadeia de Suprimentos"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_w - 3 * gap) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (value, label) in enumerate(stats):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_w, Inches(2.0), value, label)

    add_footer(slide, "03")


def slide_04_challenges(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:

def slide_11_roadmap(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Roadmap de Implementação"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6), "Roadmap de Implementação", font_size=28, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_COLOR)

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Diagnóstico e Planejamento"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Implementação de IoT e Sensores"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Integração de IA Preditiva"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Automação de Armazéns Piloto"),
        ("Q1 2026", "Expansão para Todos os CD's"),
        ("Q2 2026", "Otimização Contínua e Escala"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.8)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2
    y_pos = Inches(1.5)

    for i, (period, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        col = i % 3
        row = i // 3
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap)
        y = y_pos + row * Inches(2.0)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, Inches(1.7), period, desc)

    # Connecting line shapes between milestones
    for i in range(len(milestones) - 1):
        col_a = i % 3
        row_a = i // 3
        col_b = (i + 1) % 3
        row_b = (i + 1) // 3

        x1 = start_x + col_a * (card_w + gap) + card_w / 2
        y1 = y_pos + row_a * Inches(2.0) + Inches(1.7)
        x2 = start_x + col_b * (card_w + gap) + card_w / 2
        y2 = y_pos + row_b * Inches(2.0)

        if col_b > col_a or row_b > row_a:
            line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RIGHT_ARROW, x1 + Inches(0.1), y1 - Inches(0.05), card_w / 3, Pt(4))
            line_shape.fill.solid()
            line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
            line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, "11")

When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.DOUGHNUT`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_RED = RGBColor(196, 30, 58)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(245, 245, 245)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(33, 33, 33)
ACCENT_GRAY = RGBColor(180, 180, 180)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(120, 120, 120)

TITLE_FONT = "Aptos" if os.path.exists("C:/Windows/Fonts/Aptos.ttf") else "Calibri"
BODY_FONT = "Calibri"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.6)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.6)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color=WHITE):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=BODY_FONT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top, font_size=18, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_RED):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(6), Inches(0.5))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = TITLE_FONT
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=20):
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(4), Inches(0.3),
        "Annual Impact Report 2024", font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    )
    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(11.8), Inches(7.0), Inches(1), Inches(0.3),
        f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT
    )


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6),
                     alt_text, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    # Red accent bar at top
    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(1.2), PRIMARY_RED)

    # Title text on red bar
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.7),
                 "Annual Impact Report", font_size=40, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Subtitle below red bar
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2), Inches(1.8), Inches(9), Inches(0.6),
                 "Making a Difference Together — 2024", font_size=24, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Thin decorative line
    add_card(slide, Inches(5), Inches(2.7), Inches(3), Inches(0.04), PRIMARY_RED)

    # Organization name and year
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(10), Inches(0.5),
                 "Community Hope Foundation", font_size=28, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.9), Inches(10), Inches(0.4),
                 "Annual Report & Fundraising Goals", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Bottom decorative element
    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(7.2), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.3), PRIMARY_RED)

def build_program_overview_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Programs & Initiatives"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.4), Inches(11), Inches(0.6),
                     "Programs & Initiatives", font_size=32, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(1.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.05), PRIMARY_RED)

    programs = [
        ("Education Access", "Providing scholarships and learning resources to 4,200 students annually"),
        ("Healthcare Outreach", "Mobile clinics serving rural communities with free medical care"),
        ("Clean Water Initiative", "Building wells and water systems in 15 villages across the region"),
        ("Youth Empowerment", "Mentorship programs for at-risk youth aged 14–24"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(5.8)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_width - gap) / 2 + Inches(0.5)

    for i, (name, desc) in enumerate(programs):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.6) + row * Inches(2.8)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(2.4), WHITE, PRIMARY_RED)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(0.06), PRIMARY_RED)

        # Icon placeholder circle
        icon_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.8))
        icon_shape.fill.solid()
        icon_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_RED
        icon_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(1.3), y + Inches(0.25), card_width - Inches(1.6), Inches(0.4),
                     name, font_size=18, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.2), card_width - Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0),
                     desc, font_size=13, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 5)

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(8), Inches(0.3),
                     line2, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Bottom decorative element
    add_card(slide, Inches(0), Inches(7.2), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.3), PRIMARY_RED)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(6.8), Inches(10), Inches(0.4),
                 "Community Hope Foundation — www.communityhope.org", font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 20)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()

Build a commercial real estate proposal presentation aimed at investors. Output the file as 'Metro_Tower_Proposal.pptx', use English language content, and configure the slides to 16:9 Widescreen landscape orientation. The aesthetic should be elegant minimalist with high contrast black and white themes.
