from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10.0)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(5.625)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Metro_Tower_Proposal.pptx"

BLACK = RGBColor(0, 0, 0)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(245, 245, 245)
MID_GRAY = RGBColor(204, 204, 204)
ACCENT_GOLD = RGBColor(200, 169, 110)

FONT_HEADING = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)
BOTTOM_MARGIN = Inches(0.4)


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color or BLACK
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    if bg_color:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    else:
        shape.fill.background()
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, left=LEFT_MARGIN, top=TOP_MARGIN):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(3), Inches(0.4))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = label_text.upper()
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(8.5), Inches(5.2), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = str(page_number)
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = MID_GRAY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = MID_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_0_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(7), Inches(1.2),
        "METRO TOWER", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(6), Inches(0.5),
        "A Landmark Commercial Development in the Heart of Downtown", font_size=18, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.7), Inches(5), Inches(0.4),
        "Investor Proposal — Q1 2025", font_size=14, bold=False, color=ACCENT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    )

    add_footer(slide, "1")


def slide_1_market_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_section_label(slide, "Market Overview")

    # Title
    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(1.0), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
        "Downtown Office Market — Strong Fundamentals", font_size=24, bold=True, color=BLACK
    )

    # Three stat cards in a row
    card_width = Inches(2.3)
    card_height = Inches(1.4)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_width - 2 * gap) / 2

    stats = [
        ("96%", "Occupancy Rate", "Above market average"),
        ("4.2%", "Rental Growth", "Year-over-year increase"),
        ("180K", "Leased Sq Ft", "In the past 12 months"),
    ]

    for i, (value, label, desc) in enumerate(stats):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.9)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, card_height, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY, border_color=MID_GRAY)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6),
                     value, font_size=32, bold=True, color=BLACK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.7), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     label, font_size=12, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.05), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     desc, font_size=9, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Market drivers text
    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(3.6), Inches(8.5), Inches(1.2),
        "The downtown submarket continues to attract institutional capital driven by limited new supply, strong tenant demand from technology and financial services firms, and a 96% occupancy rate that exceeds the national average of 87%. Prime Class-A rents have appreciated 4.2% year-over-year.", font_size=13, bold=False, color=BLACK
    )

    add_footer(slide, "2")


def slide_2_project_details(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
    add_section_label(slide, "Project Overview", top=Inches(0.3))

    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.7), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
        "Metro Tower — 42-Story Mixed-Use Development", font_size=24, bold=True, color=WHITE
    )

    # Four feature cards in 2x2 grid
    card_w = Inches(3.7)
    card_h = Inches(1.5)
    gap_x = Inches(0.3)
    gap_y = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_w - gap_x) / 2

    features = [
        ("42 Stories", "Class-A Office Space\nTotal: 680,000 sq ft"),
        ("Retail Podium", "15,000 sq ft of premium\nretail and dining space"),
        ("Parking Garage", "800-space underground\nparking facility"),
        ("Amenities", "Rooftop terrace, fitness center,\nconference facilities"),
    ]

    for idx, (title_text, body_text) in enumerate(features):
        col = idx % 2
        row = idx // 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap_x)
        y = Inches(1.6) + row * (card_h + gap_y)

        card = add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, bg_color=RGBColor(30, 30, 30), border_color=MID_GRAY)

        # Accent line at top of card
        accent_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.08), Inches(0.6), Pt(2))
        accent_shape.fill.solid()
        accent_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
        accent_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.3), card_w - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4),
                     title_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.75), card_w - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6),
                     body_text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY)

    # Location info at bottom
    add_text_box(
        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(4.5), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.5),

    )

def slide_3_financial_projections(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

        title_shape.text = ""
    add_section_label(slide, "Financial Projections")

        slide, LEFT_MARGIN, Inches(0.7), Inches(8.5), Inches(0.6),
        "Revenue Projection — 5-Year Outlook", font_size=24, bold=True, color=BLACK
    )

    # Bar chart: projected revenue over 5 years
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2024", "2025", "2026", "2027", "2028"]
    chart_data.add_series("Projected Revenue ($M)", (12.5, 14.8, 17.2, 19.6, 22.3))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.0),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False

    # Style the chart series
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.gap_width = 80
    series = plot.series[0]
    fill = series.format.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD

    # Chart title
    chart.has_title = True
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Annual Revenue ($M)"
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(12)
    chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = False

    # Value axis formatting
    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.has_title = True
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "$ (Millions)"
    value_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(9)

    category_axis = chart.category_axis
    category_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)

    # Three metric cards below the chart
    card_w = Inches(2.3)
    card_h = Inches(1.4)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 3 * card_w - 2 * gap) / 2

    metrics = [
        ("$8.4M", "Net Operating Income", "Year 3 Projection"),

    ]

    for i, (value, label, desc) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(4.7)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, bg_color=LIGHT_GRAY, border_color=MID_GRAY)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6),
                     value, font_size=30, bold=True, color=BLACK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.7), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     label, font_size=12, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(1.05), card_w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3),
                     desc, font_size=9, bold=False, color=MID_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

BG_COLOR = RGBColor(0x2C, 0x3E, 0x50)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0x34, 0x49, 0x5E)
ACCENT = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6B, 0x35)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_TEXT = RGBColor(0xB0, 0xBC, 0xC5)

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True

    run.font.name = font_name or FONT_PRIMARY

def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=CARD_BG, accent_color=ACCENT):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.35), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), title, font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.35), top + Inches(0.7), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.9), body, font_size=12, color=LIGHT_TEXT)

def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):

        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_BG
        shape.line.color.rgb = MID_GREY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

from pptx import Presentation

def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    hex_color = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_color[0:2], 16), int(hex_color[2:4], 16), int(hex_color[4:6], 16))


NAVY = "#0A2463"

def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, SLIDE_HEIGHT)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, font_name="Aptos", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body_text):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    card_shape.fill.solid()
    card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)

    run_title.font.bold = True

    tf_body = body_box.text_frame

    for i, line in enumerate(body_text.split("\n")):
        if i == 0:
            p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p_body = tf_body.add_paragraph()
        run_body = p_body.add_run()
        run_body.text = "• " + line
        run_body.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_body.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_TEXT)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.oxml.ns import qn
import os

# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

BG_NAVY = "#0B1426"
BG_DARK_SLAKE = "#1A2744"
ACCENT_GOLD = "#FFD700"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
LIGHT_GRAY = "#E8ECF1"
MUTED_BLUE = "#3A7CA5"
CARD_BG = "#1E3056"
CARD_BORDER = "#2A4A7B"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = ["Arial", "Malgun Gothic"]


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_PRIMARY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, accent_color=ACCENT_GOLD):
    bar_width = Inches(0.4)
    bar_height = Inches(0.06)
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.0), bar_width, bar_height)
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.98),
                             Inches(3), bar_height + Inches(0.1),
                             label_text.upper(), font_size=11, bold=True,
                             color_hex=hex_to_rgb(accent_color))


def add_footer(slide, text="MEDIA & ENTRETENIMIENTO | CONFIDENCIAL", font_size=8):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), Inches(12), Inches(0.35),
                 text, font_size=font_size, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path=None, placeholder_text=""):
    if path and os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BG_DARK_SLAKE)
        line = ph.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BORDER)
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
        line.dash_style = None  # no dash pattern; solid border only
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.15),
                     width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.3),
                     placeholder_text or "PLACEHOLDER", font_size=9, bold=True,
                     color_hex=MUTED_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout

                 "PRESENTACIÓN DE CONTENIDO", font_size=48, bold=True,

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(10), Inches(0.6),
                 "Slate de Contenido para Socios Estratégicos", font_size=24, bold=False,
                 color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(4.1),
                                 Inches(2.3), Inches(0.06))

    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.5), Inches(10), Inches(0.5),
                 "2025 — 2026", font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, text="MEDIA & ENTRETENIMIENTO | CONFIDENCIAL")

    if title_shape is not None:

    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "ESTRATEGIA DE DISTRIBUCIÓN", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    channels = [
        ("Cine", "Estrenos en salas seleccionadas"),
        ("Streaming", "Plataformas OTT globales"),
        ("TV Lineal", "Emisión en canales premium"),
        ("VOD", "Alquiler y compra digital"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    card_h = Inches(3.5)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (13.333 - 4 * card_w - 3 * gap) / 2

    for i, (name, desc) in enumerate(channels):
        x = start_x + i * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(1.4)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h)
        icon = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.CHEVRON, x + Inches(0.8), y + Inches(0.5),
                                      Inches(1.2), Inches(1.2))
        icon.fill.solid()
        icon.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
        icon.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.9), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5),
                     name, font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(2.5), card_w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.8),
                     desc, font_size=12, color_hex=MUTED_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_revenue_chart_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "DISTRIBUCIÓN DE INGRESOS"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "DISTRIBUCIÓN DE INGRESOS", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ['Streaming', 'Licenciamiento', 'Cine', 'Merchandising']
    chart_data.add_series('Ingreso (%)', (42, 28, 18, 12))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE,
        Inches(3.5), Inches(1.5), Inches(6.3), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    series_list = list(chart.series)
    for i, series in enumerate(series_list):

        if i < len(colors):

def build_timeline_roadmap_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_NAVY)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "HOJA DE RUTA 2025–2026"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
                r.font.size = Pt(30)
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.5), Inches(12), Inches(0.6),
                     "HOJA DE RUTA 2025–2026", font_size=30, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD)

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Lanzamiento de catálogo"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Acuerdos internacionales"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Estrenos de verano"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Premios y festivales"),
        ("Q1 2026", "Nuevas producciones"),
    ]

    line_y = Inches(3.8)
    total_width = Inches(11.5)
    start_x = MARGIN_LEFT + (13.333 - total_width) / 2
    step = total_width / (len(milestones) - 1)

    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, start_x, line_y, total_width, Inches(0.06))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(CARD_BORDER)
    line.line.fill.background()

    for i, (quarter, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        x = start_x + i * step
        dot = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x - Inches(0.15), line_y - Inches(0.15),
                                     Inches(0.3), Inches(0.3))
        dot.fill.solid()
        dot.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
        dot.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x - Inches(0.8), line_y + Inches(0.4), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.35),
                     quarter, font_size=12, bold=True, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x - Inches(1.2), line_y + Inches(0.8), Inches(2.4), Inches(0.6),
                     desc, font_size=11, color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide)


def build_contact_closing_slide(prs):

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.5), Inches(3.2),

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(10), Inches(0.5),

# ── Main ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_agenda_slide(prs)
    build_content_overview_slide(prs)
    build_film_slate_slide(prs)
    build_tv_series_slide(prs)
    build_streaming_focus_slide(prs)
    build_viewership_chart_slide(prs)
    build_distribution_strategy_slide(prs)
    build_revenue_chart_slide(prs)
    build_timeline_roadmap_slide(prs)
    build_contact_closing_slide(prs)

    prs.save("media_content_slate.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "ecommerce_q4.pptx"

PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x25, 0x63, 0xEB)
SECONDARY = RGBColor(0x0E, 0xA5, 0xE9)
ACCENT = RGBColor(0xF5, 0x9E, 0xB)
SUCCESS = RGBColor(0x10, 0xB9, 0x81)
DANGER = RGBColor(0xEF, 0x44, 0x44)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
BLACK = RGBColor(0x11, 0x18, 0x27)
GRAY_50 = RGBColor(0xF9, 0xFA, 0xFB)
GRAY_100 = RGBColor(0xF3, 0xF4, 0xF6)
GRAY_200 = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
GRAY_400 = RGBColor(0x9C, 0xA0, 0xA8)
GRAY_600 = RGBColor(0x4B, 0x55, 0x63)
GRAY_800 = RGBColor(0x1F, 0x29, 0x37)

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.75)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.75)
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(2.8)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.6)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.3)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=GRAY_800, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = "Aptos"
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, value, subtitle="", accent_color=PRIMARY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = GRAY_200
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), title, font_size=11, bold=True, color=GRAY_600)
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5), value, font_size=28, bold=True, color=BLACK)

    if subtitle:
        sub_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(1.15), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.04))
        sub_shape.fill.solid()
        sub_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = accent_color

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    label = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, y_position, Inches(12), Inches(0.5))
    tf = label.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(18)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    run.font.name = "Aptos"


def add_footer(slide, page_number, total_pages):
    num_text = f"{page_number} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.3), num_text, font_size=9, color=GRAY_400, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = GRAY_100
        shape.line.color.rgb = GRAY_200
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.25), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), "이미지", font_size=14, color=GRAY_400, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_line(slide, left, top, width, color=GRAY_200):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.03))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_bulleted_list(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=14):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.space_after = Pt(8)
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = GRAY_800
        run.font.name = "Aptos"


def add_numbered_list(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=14):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.space_after = Pt(10)
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"{i + 1}. {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = GRAY_800
        run.font.name = "Aptos"


def add_title_text(slide, text):

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# --- Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(5.625)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Supply_Chain_Optimization.pptx"

ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6B, 0x35)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x2D, 0x2D)
BLACK = RGBColor(0x1A, 0x1A, 0x1A)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xE8, 0xE8)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x4D, 0x4D, 0x4D)

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
TITLE_SIZE = Pt(36)
SUBTITLE_SIZE = Pt(18)
BODY_SIZE = Pt(14)
CARD_TEXT_SIZE = Pt(12)
FOOTER_SIZE = Pt(10)

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.75)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(2.8)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.4)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.2)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    r = int(hex_color[1:3], 16)
    g = int(hex_color[3:5], 16)
    b = int(hex_color[5:7], 16)
    return RGBColor(r, g, b)


def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=Pt(14),
                 font_color=WHITE, bold=False, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT,
                 font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = font_size
    run.font.color.rgb = font_color
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text="", body_text=""):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
    shape.line.color.rgb = ORANGE
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.1)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.1)

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_title.add_run()
    run_t.text = title_text
    run_t.font.size = Pt(13)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.color.rgb = ORANGE
    run_t.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    if body_text:
        p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
        run_b = p_body.add_run()
        run_b.text = body_text
        run_b.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_b.font.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    label_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.35),
                                          Inches(1.2), Inches(0.08))
    label_shape.fill.solid()
    label_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ORANGE
    label_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.45), Inches(3), Inches(0.3),
                 text, Pt(12), ORANGE, True)


def add_footer(slide):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.25),
                 "Supply Chain Optimierung | Confidential", FOOTER_SIZE, MEDIUM_GRAY, False, PP_ALIGN.LEFT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, image_path):
    if os.path.exists(image_path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(image_path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.4), width - Inches(0.4),
                     height - Inches(0.6), "Bildplatzhalter", Pt(12), MEDIUM_GRAY, False, PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

Generate a python-pptx script that builds a 12-slide corporate presentation for Private Equity Firms outlining our EdTech Scale-Up Plan. Use structured growth charts and market analysis tables. Output the file as "EdTech_Scale.pptx". All content must be written in English using a 4:3 Standard layout. You are strictly prohibited from using any external APIs, web scraping, or internet access to fetch data or assets; all content and logic must be generated purely within the script. When creating charts, you must strictly use XL_CHART_TYPE from the library; do not import or use ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Before setting text on a title shape, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None first to prevent errors. Your response must be structured with distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. All Python code must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "EdTech_Scale.pptx"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

CARD_GAP = Inches(0.2)
ROW_GAP = Inches(0.15)

COLOR_PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x4A)       # Navy
COLOR_ACCENT = RGBColor(0x00, 0xA8, 0x96)          # Teal
COLOR_LIGHT_BG = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF7, 0xFA)        # Light gray
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2C, 0x3E, 0x50)       # Dark text
COLOR_MUTED_GRAY = RGBColor(0x7F, 0x8C, 0x8D)      # Muted gray
COLOR_GOLD = RGBColor(0xD4, 0xAF, 0x37)            # Gold accent
COLOR_CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_TABLE_HEADER = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x4A)
COLOR_TABLE_ALT_ROW = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF7, 0xFA)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_TEXT
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body=None, bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=COLOR_ACCENT):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    line = shape.line
    line.color.rgb = border_color
    line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35),
                     title, font_size=13, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7),
                     body, font_size=11, color=COLOR_DARK_TEXT)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, x, y):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_ACCENT
    shape.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y - Inches(0.02), Inches(4), Inches(0.5),
                 label_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), Inches(3), Inches(0.4),
                 "EdTech Scale-Up Plan  |  Confidential", font_size=9, color=COLOR_MUTED_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.4),
                 f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=COLOR_MUTED_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_BG
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = COLOR_MUTED_GRAY
        line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + (height - Inches(0.4)) / 2, width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4),
                     "Image Placeholder", font_size=11, color=COLOR_MUTED_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_chart(slide, chart_type, left, top, width, height, category_data, series_names, values_2d):
    data = CategoryChartData()
    data.categories = category_data

    for i, series_name in enumerate(series_names):
        data.add_series(series_name, values=values_2d[i])

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_type, left, top, width, height, data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(9)

    return chart_frame


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(7), Inches(1.2),
                 "EdTech Scale-Up Plan", font_size=38, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(7), Inches(0.6),
                 "Strategic Growth Framework for Private Equity Partners", font_size=20, color=COLOR_ACCENT)

    # Decorative accent bar
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(3), Inches(0.06))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.4), Inches(7), Inches(0.5),
                 "Confidential  |  Prepared for Investment Committee Review", font_size=12, color=COLOR_MUTED_GRAY)
    add_footer(slide, 1, 12)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), Inches(8), Inches(0.5),
                     "Executive Summary", font_size=24, bold=True, color=COLOR_PRIMARY)

    # Three summary cards
    card_w = (Inches(10) - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT - 2 * CARD_GAP) / 3
    for i in range(3):
        x = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + CARD_GAP)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.2), card_w, Inches(1.8),
                 title=["Market Opportunity", "Growth Strategy", "Investment Return"][i],
                 body=[
                     "$47B TAM in K-12 EdTech with 18% CAGR through 2030",
                     "Platform-led expansion across 3 verticals and 5 geographies",
                     "Target IRR of 28%+ over 5-year hold period"
                 ][i])

    # Key metrics strip
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4),

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color=COLOR_BLACK):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=COLOR_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=12, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.65), body, font_size=10, color=COLOR_WHITE)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.3), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.4), text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=15):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.3), f"Holiday Sales Forecast | {page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=RGBColor(128, 128, 128), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)


def add_decorative_line(slide, left, top, width, color=COLOR_RED):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.04))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    return line_shape


def add_gold_accent_bar(slide, left, top, width):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.06))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
    return bar


def add_bullet_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=12, color=COLOR_WHITE):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = color
        run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return txBox


# --- Slide Builders ---

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    add_gold_accent_bar(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.8), Inches(10.3))
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.0), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.2), "Holiday Sales Forecast", font_size=44, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(3.3), Inches(6.3), COLOR_RED)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.6), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.8), "FY 2024 Holiday Season Performance Analysis & Outlook", font_size=18, color=COLOR_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.0), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Retail Division — Prepared for Store Managers", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(180, 180, 180), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.7), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.5), "November – December 2024", font_size=13, color=COLOR_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def build_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Agenda"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Agenda", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    agenda_items = [
        ("01", "Executive Summary"),
        ("02", "Market Overview & Historical Trends"),
        ("03", "Current Year Performance"),
        ("04", "Category & Channel Analysis"),
        ("05", "Regional Insights & Inventory Planning"),
        ("06", "Staffing Forecast & Promotional Calendar"),
        ("07", "Risk Factors & Action Items"),
    ]

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(agenda_items):
        y = Inches(1.4) + Inches(i * 0.75)
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), num, font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.3), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(4), Inches(0.5), label, font_size=16, color=COLOR_WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def build_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Executive Summary", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    metrics = [
        ("Projected Revenue", "$48.2M", "Target: $50M"),
        ("YoY Growth", "+12.3%", "vs. Holiday 2023"),
        ("Foot Traffic", "+8.7%", "In-store visits"),
        ("Online Sales", "+18.5%", "E-commerce growth"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.9)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_width - 3 * gap) / 2

    for i, (title, value, subtitle) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        y = Inches(1.5)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(1.8), title=title, body=f"{value}\n{subtitle}", bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=COLOR_GOLD)

    summary_text = "The 2024 holiday season is projected to deliver strong performance driven by early promotional activity and robust consumer spending across key categories."
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(3.6), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.5), summary_text, font_size=13, color=RGBColor(200, 200, 200))

    key_points = [
        "Strong Q4 consumer confidence supports higher basket sizes",
        "Early Black Friday promotions driving incremental traffic",
        "Online channel continues to outpace in-store growth",
        "Inventory levels well-positioned for peak demand periods"
    ]
    add_bullet_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.2), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.8), key_points)

    add_footer(slide, 3)

Electronics, apparel, and home goods remain top performers with strong margin profiles.", font_size=12, color=COLOR_WHITE)

def build_historical_trends(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Historical Sales Trends"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Historical Sales Trends", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Oct", "Nov 1-10", "Nov 11-20", "Nov 21-30", "Dec 1-10", "Dec 11-20", "Dec 21-31"]
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2022 ($M)", (6.8, 9.2, 11.5, 7.4, 5.9, 8.1, 10.3))
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2023 ($M)", (7.5, 10.1, 13.2, 8.6, 6.8, 9.4, 11.8))
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2024 Forecast ($M)", (8.1, 11.3, 15.0, 9.8, 7.5, 10.6, 13.2))

    left = Inches(0.8)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(11.7)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True

    for series in plot.series:
        series.format.line.width = Pt(2.5)
        if "FY 2024" in series.name:
            series.format.line.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        elif "FY 2023" in series.name:
            series.format.line.color.rgb = COLOR_RED
        else:
            series.format.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(150, 150, 150)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(6.2), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.7), "3-Year Holiday Season Comparison — Strong upward trajectory with accelerating growth in peak weeks", font_size=11, color=RGBColor(180, 180, 180))
    add_footer(slide, 5)

def build_category_breakdown(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_BLACK)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Category Breakdown"
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
        title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Category Breakdown", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Electronics", "Apparel", "Home & Garden", "Toys", "Beauty", "Gift Cards"]
    chart_data.add_series("Revenue Share (%)", (30, 24, 16, 14, 8, 8))

    left = Inches(0.5)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(5.5)
    height = Inches(4.5)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    for i, point in enumerate(chart.series[0].points):
        colors = [COLOR_GOLD, COLOR_RED, RGBColor(255, 165, 0), RGBColor(200, 100, 50), RGBColor(180, 50, 50), RGBColor(230, 200, 100)]
        if i < len(colors):
            point.format.fill.solid()
            point.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = colors[i]

    categories_detail = [
        ("Electronics (30%)", "TVs, headphones, gaming consoles — highest revenue driver"),
        ("Apparel (24%)", "Winter coats, accessories, formal wear for holiday events"),
        ("Home & Garden (16%)", "Decorations, kitchen appliances, bedding sets"),
        ("Toys (14%)", "Educational toys, board games, outdoor play items"),
    ]

    y = Inches(1.5)
    for label, desc in categories_detail:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), y, Inches(2.8), Inches(0.3), label, font_size=12, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(3.8), Inches(0.6), desc, font_size=10, color=RGBColor(200, 200, 200))
        y += Inches(0.7)

    add_footer(slide, 7)

        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.4), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.6), "Channel Analysis", font_size=32, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    add_decorative_line(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.1), Inches(2.5), COLOR_RED)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Oct", "Nov 1-10", "Nov 11-20", "Nov 21-30", "Dec 1-10", "Dec 11-20", "Dec 21-31"]
    chart_data.add_series("In-Store ($M)", (4.5, 6.8, 9.2, 5.8, 4.2, 5.9, 7.5))
    chart_data.add_series("Online ($M)", (3.6, 4.5, 5.8, 4.0, 3.3, 4.7, 5.7))

    left = Inches(0.8)
    top = Inches(1.5)
    width = Inches(11.7)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_STACKED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]

    for series in plot.series:
        if "In-Store" in series.name:
            series.format.fill.solid()
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_RED

            series.format.fill.solid()
            series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD

    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    channel_insights = [
        "In-store remains the dominant channel at 57% of total holiday revenue",
        "Online sales growing faster YoY (+18.5%) but smaller base",
        "BOPIS (Buy Online, Pick Up In-Store) up 32% — key growth driver",
        "Mobile commerce accounts for 45% of all online transactions"
    ]

    y = Inches(5.9)
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y, SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(0.3), "Channel Insights:", font_size=13, bold=True, color=COLOR_GOLD)
    for i, insight in enumerate(channel_insights):
        add_bullet_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.45) + Inches(i * 0.28), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2 - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), [insight])

    ]

    card_width = Inches(4.0)
    gap = Inches(0.3)

        risk_color = COLOR_RED if level == "HIGH" else RGBColor(230, 160, 50) if level == "MEDIUM" else COLOR_GOLD
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_width, Inches(1.7), title=f"{risk} — {level}", body=desc, bg_color=COLOR_CARD_BG, border_color=risk_color)

    mitigation_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(5.2), SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT * 2, Inches(1.6))

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

NAVY = RGBColor(27, 42, 74)
GOLD = RGBColor(201, 168, 76)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(245, 245, 245)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(45, 45, 45)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(160, 160, 160)

FONT_HEADING = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"

LEFT_MARGIN = Inches(0.6)
RIGHT_MARGIN = Inches(0.6)
TOP_MARGIN = Inches(0.5)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY, color=DARK_TEXT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_shape(slide, shape_type, left, top, width, height, fill_color=None, line_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(shape_type, left, top, width, height)
    if fill_color:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = fill_color
    else:
        shape.fill.background()
    if line_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = line_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    return shape


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text, body_text, accent_color=GOLD):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    card_shape.fill.solid()
    card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    card_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(220, 220, 220)
    card_shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    accent_bar = add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.08), height - Inches(0.3), fill_color=accent_color)
    accent_bar.line.fill.background()

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.4), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), title_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=NAVY)
    body_box = add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.4), top + Inches(0.75), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(1.0), body_text, font_size=12, color=DARK_TEXT)

    return card_shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top):
    label_box = add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.35), text.upper(), font_size=10, bold=True, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT)
    return label_box


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    footer_text = f"real_estate_developments.pptx  |  {page_number}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(7.1), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.3), footer_text, font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height, fill_color=LIGHT_GRAY)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        icon_text = "📷"
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + (height - Inches(0.6)) / 2, width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), icon_text, font_size=24, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# ── Deck constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN = Inches(0.75)
CARD_RADIUS = 0.12
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_HEADING = "Arial"

# Palette: green, brown, orange + supporting colors
COLOR_GREEN = RGBColor(0x2E, 0x7D, 0x32)
COLOR_BROWN = RGBColor(0x5D, 0x40, 0x37)
COLOR_ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x6F, 0x00)
COLOR_CREAM = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xF8, 0xE1)
COLOR_DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN = RGBColor(0xC8, 0xE6, 0xC9)
COLOR_LIGHT_ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xE0, 0xB2)
COLOR_LIGHT_BROWN = RGBColor(0xD7, 0xCC, 0xBB)

# ── Color helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))

# ── Helper functions ────────────────────────────────────────────
def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)

def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color="#333333", alignment=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color) if isinstance(color, str) else color
    p.font.name = FONT_HEADING if bold else FONT_BODY
    if alignment:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox

def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color="#FFFFFF", title_color="#333333"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_BROWN
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title:
        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = title
        p.font.size = Pt(16)
        p.font.bold = True
        p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(title_color) if isinstance(title_color, str) else title_color
        p.font.name = FONT_HEADING
        tf.add_paragraph()
    if body:
        p2 = shape.text_frame.paragraphs[-1]
        p2.text = body
        p2.font.size = Pt(13)
        p2.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY
        p2.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return shape

def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=28, color="#FF6F00"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(10), Inches(1))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = True
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color) if isinstance(color, str) else color
    p.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    return txBox

def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(10.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.4))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    p.text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    p.font.size = Pt(10)
    p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY

def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_GREEN
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.6))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        p.text = "Imagen"
        p.font.size = Pt(14)
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_GREEN
        p.font.name = FONT_BODY

def add_decorative_line(slide, left, top, width, color="#FF6F00"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.06))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color) if isinstance(color, str) else color
    return shape

# ── Slide builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────
def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFF8E1")

    # Decorative top bar
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, "#2E7D32")
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0), Inches(0.5), SLIDE_WIDTH, "#FF6F00")

    # Title
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Estrategia de Renovación de Menú"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(44)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN
        title_shape.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(10), Inches(1.2),
                 "Plan de Transición para Franquicias — Temporada 2025",
                 font_size=24, color="#5D4037")

    # Decorative line under subtitle
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(4.5), Inches(4.1), Inches(4.3), "#FF6F00")

    # Presenter info card
    add_card(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(6.3), Inches(1.2),
             title="Presentado por: Dirección de Operaciones",
             body="Contacto: operaciones@franquicia.com | www.franquicia.com",
             bg_color="#FFFFFF")

    add_footer(slide, 1, 10)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title

        title_shape.font.size = Pt(40)

        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.3), Inches(2.5), "#FF6F00")

    for i, item in enumerate(agenda_items):
        y = Inches(1.8) + Inches(i * 0.75)

        num_shape.fill.solid()

        num_shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE

        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.2), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(0.45), Inches(0.35))

        # Item text
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), y + Inches(0.05), Inches(8), Inches(0.4),
                     item, font_size=20, color="#333333")

    add_footer(slide, 2, 10)

def build_timeline_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Cronograma de Implementación"
        title_shape.font.size = Pt(38)
        title_shape.font.bold = True
        title_shape.font.color.rgb = COLOR_BROWN

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), "#FF6F00")

    milestones = [
        ("Q1 2025", "Desarrollo de Recetas", "Pruebas internas y ajustes de sabor"),
        ("Q2 2025", "Capacitación del Personal", "Talleres en cada franquicia"),
        ("Q3 2025", "Lanzamiento Piloto", "10 ubicaciones seleccionadas"),
        ("Q4 2025", "Expansión Nacional", "Despliegue completo de la red"),
        ("Enero 2026", "Evaluación y Ajustes", "Feedback y optimización continua"),
    ]

    for i, (period, title_text, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        left = Inches(1.0 + i * 2.4)
        top = Inches(2.5)

        # Milestone marker circle
        marker = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left + Inches(0.8), top - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        marker.fill.solid()
        marker.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_ORANGE if i < 4 else COLOR_GREEN
        marker.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
        marker.line.width = Pt(2)

        # Connecting line (except last)
        if i < len(milestones) - 1:
            line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(1.4), top, Inches(1.0), Inches(0.05))
            line_shape.fill.solid()
            line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_BROWN

        # Card below marker
        add_card(slide, left, top + Inches(0.8), Inches(2.2), Inches(3.0),
                 title=period, body=f"{title_text}\n\n{desc}", bg_color="#FFFFFF")

    add_footer(slide, 8, 10)

    add_footer(slide, 10, 10)


# ── Main entry point ────────────────────────────────────────────
def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    build_title_slide(prs)
    build_agenda_slide(prs)
    build_overview_slide(prs)
    build_seasonal_strategy_slide(prs)
    build_new_products_slide(prs)
    build_pricing_analysis_slide(prs)
    build_customer_preferences_slide(prs)
    build_timeline_slide(prs)
    build_financial_projections_slide(prs)
    build_closing_slide(prs)

    output_file = "Menu_Rollover.pptx"
    prs.save(output_file)
    print(f"Presentation saved to {output_file}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

Generate a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Onboarding Program' for new hires joining our HR department. The presentation should consist of 18 slides using a friendly and modern theme with rounded corners and soft colors. Use German for all content and set the slide size to 16:9 Widescreen orientation. from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY = RGBColor(0x4A, 0x90, 0xD9)
SECONDARY = RGBColor(0xF8, 0xBB, 0xD0)
TERTIARY = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xF5, 0xE9)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2C, 0x3E, 0x50)
LIGHT_BG = RGBColor(0xFA, 0xFB, 0xFC)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
ACCENT_ORANGE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0x70, 0x43)
SOFT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF5, 0xF5)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
MINT_GREEN = RGBColor(0xA5, 0xD6, 0xA7)
LIGHT_BLUE = RGBColor(0xBB, 0xDE, 0xFB)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FAFBFC"):
    bg_color = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = "Calibri"
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body=None, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=PRIMARY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=13, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)
    if body:
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = body
        run.font.size = Pt(11)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, x, y):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.35), Inches(1.2), Pt(4))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY
    line_shape.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, x, y - Inches(0.1), Inches(6), Inches(0.35), text, font_size=28, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=18):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY
    bar.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(3), Inches(0.35), "HR Onboarding-Programm", font_size=9, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.35), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=9, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = SOFT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xDD, 0xDD, 0xDD)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), "Bild-Platzhalter", font_size=10, color=RGBColor(0x99, 0x99, 0x99), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_circle_icon(slide, left, top, size, fill_color):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = fill_color
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_arrow_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2):
    connector = slide.shapes.add_connector(1, x1, y1, x2, y2)
    connector.line.color.rgb = PRIMARY
    connector.line.width = Pt(2)
    return connector


def add_bullet_text(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=11):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.space_after = Pt(4)
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(5), Inches(0.5), "Wir freuen uns auf dich!", font_size=16, color=RGBColor(0xBB, 0xDE, 0xFB), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

Design a minimalist PowerPoint presentation for internal healthcare teams to summarize clinical trial updates, containing exactly 8 slides with a white and teal color palette. Save the file as "Clinical_Trial_Update.pptx". All content should be written in French using 4:3 Standard slide dimensions. Do not use any external APIs or web scraping; rely solely on locally generated placeholder data. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10.0)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Clinical_Trial_Update.pptx"

TEAL_PRIMARY = RGBColor(13, 148, 136)
TEAL_DARK = RGBColor(15, 118, 110)
TEAL_LIGHT = RGBColor(204, 251, 241)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
GRAY_TEXT = RGBColor(55, 65, 81)
GRAY_SUBTLE = RGBColor(107, 114, 128)
LIGHT_GRAY_BG = RGBColor(243, 244, 246)

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_SIZE_TITLE = 32
FONT_SIZE_SUBTITLE = 18
FONT_SIZE_HEADING = 20
FONT_SIZE_BODY = 14
FONT_SIZE_SMALL = 11


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    """Fill the slide background with a solid color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    """Add a text box with the given properties."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = GRAY_TEXT
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text=None, body_text=None):
    """Add a styled card (rounded rectangle) with optional title and body."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(209, 213, 219)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    if title_text:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.25), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4),
                     title_text, font_size=FONT_SIZE_HEADING, bold=True, color=TEAL_DARK)

    if body_text:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.25), top + Inches(0.65), width - Inches(0.5), height - Inches(0.85),
                     body_text, font_size=FONT_SIZE_BODY, color=GRAY_TEXT)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    """Add a teal section label bar with white text."""
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), y_position, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_PRIMARY
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), y_position + Inches(0.02), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.25),
                 text, font_size=FONT_SIZE_SMALL, bold=True, color=WHITE)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=8):
    """Add a small footer with slide number."""
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(9.0), Inches(7.15), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.3),
                 f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=FONT_SIZE_SMALL, color=GRAY_SUBTLE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Insert an image if the file exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_LIGHT
        shape.line.color.rgb = TEAL_PRIMARY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.3), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6),
                     "Image", font_size=FONT_SIZE_SMALL, color=TEAL_DARK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_chart(slide, chart_type_enum, data_dict, left, top, width, height):
