from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# --- Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

BLACK = RGBColor(0x0A, 0x0A, 0x0A)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x1C, 0x1C, 0x1E)
GOLD = RGBColor(0xD4, 0xAF, 0x37)
LIGHT_GOLD = RGBColor(0xF2, 0xD0, 0x6B)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
OFF_WHITE = RGBColor(0xF8, 0xF8, 0xF8)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0x14, 0x14, 16)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#0A0A0A"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left=Inches(0.7), top=Inches(0.4)):
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(3), Inches(0.5), text.upper(), font_size=12, bold=True, color=GOLD)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top + Inches(0.55), Inches(1.8), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=9):
    footer_text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(1.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.4), footer_text, font_size=10, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = GOLD
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6), "Image Placeholder", font_size=12, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# --- Slide Builders ---

    # Date and company info
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(6), Inches(0.5), "Q4 2024 | Prepared for Our Valued Clients", font_size=14, color=GOLD)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PALETTE = {
    "navy": "#0A2463",
    "blue": "#1E5AA8",
    "light_blue": "#3D9BD9",
    "teal": "#00B4D8",
    "slate": "#2C3E50",
    "dark_gray": "#34495E",
    "gray": "#7F8C8D",
    "light_gray": "#ECF0F1",
    "white": "#FFFFFF",
}

FONT_TITLE = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_NUMBER = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=PALETTE["navy"]):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex="#FFFFFF", alignment=None, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    p.font.name = font_name
    if alignment:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, fill_hex=PALETTE["white"], border_hex=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(fill_hex)
    if border_hex:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_hex)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_pos):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.7), y_pos, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["teal"])
    line.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), y_pos - Inches(0.02), Inches(8), Inches(0.6), text, font_size=24, bold=True, color_hex=PALETTE["white"], font_name=FONT_TITLE)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=15):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(7.0), Inches(6), Inches(0.35), "CONFIDENTIAL — Q4 Financial Performance Review", font_size=9, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"], font_name="Calibri")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.35), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"], font_name="Calibri")


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text=""):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["light_gray"])
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gray"])
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + (height - Inches(0.4)) / 2, width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.4), alt_text, font_size=11, color_hex=PALETTE["gray"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_accent_line(slide, left, top, width, color_hex=PALETTE["teal"], thickness=Pt(3)):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, thickness)
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_chart(slide, chart_type, left, top, width, height, categories, series_data):
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = list(categories)
    for series_name, values in series_data.items():
        chart_data.add_series(str(series_name), values)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_type, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    return chart_frame

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_COLOR = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x4A)
SECONDARY_COLOR = RGBColor(0x00, 0x78, 0xD4)
SUCCESS_COLOR = RGBColor(0x10, 0x7C, 0x10)
WARNING_COLOR = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xB9, 0x00)
DANGER_COLOR = RGBColor(0xE7, 0x48, 0x56)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF3, 0xF2, 0xF1)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0xD0, 0xCF, 0xCE)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x32, 0x31, 0x30)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
CARD_PADDING = Inches(0.3)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=WHITE, border_color=MEDIUM_GRAY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + CARD_PADDING, top + CARD_PADDING, width - 2 * CARD_PADDING, Inches(0.4))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title
    run_title.font.size = Pt(13)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    run_title.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_COLOR
    run_title.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body:
        body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + CARD_PADDING, top + Inches(0.5), width - 2 * CARD_PADDING, height - Inches(0.7))
        tf_body = body_box.text_frame
        tf_body.word_wrap = True
        p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
        run_body = p_body.add_run()
        run_body.text = body
        run_body.font.size = Pt(11)
        run_body.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT
        run_body.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position):
    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position, SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.04))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, y_position + Inches(0.1), SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(0.35))
    tf_label = label_box.text_frame
    p_label = tf_label.paragraphs[0]
    run_label = p_label.add_run()
    run_label.text = text
    run_label.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_label.font.bold = True
    run_label.font.color.rgb = SECONDARY_COLOR
    run_label.font.name = FONT_HEADING


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=22):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(2.5), SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.4), Inches(2), Inches(0.3))
    tf_footer = footer_box.text_frame
    p_footer = tf_footer.paragraphs[0]
    run_footer = p_footer.add_run()
    run_footer.text = f"{slide_num} / {total}"
    run_footer.font.size = Pt(9)
    run_footer.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
    run_footer.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(alt_text):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(alt_text, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        icon_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.4))
        tf_icon = icon_box.text_frame
        p_icon = tf_icon.paragraphs[0]
        p_icon.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_icon = p_icon.add_run()
        run_icon.text = f"[{alt_text}]"
        run_icon.font.size = Pt(14)
        run_icon.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        run_icon.font.name = FONT_BODY

Design a global health vaccination partnership presentation targeting C-Suite executives (corporate partners). Name the file 'Global_Vaccination_Partnership.pptx', write in French, and set slides to 16:9 Widescreen landscape. from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# 16:9 widescreen — converted from 1280×720 px to inches (pptx uses EMUs internally)
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

DARK_GREY = "#2C3E50"
MEDIUM_GREY = "#7F8C8D"
LIGHT_GREY = "#ECF0F1"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
ORANGE_ACCENT = "#E67E22"
DEEP_ORANGE = "#D35400"

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
MARGIN_LEFT = 0.6
MARGIN_RIGHT = 0.6
CARD_PADDING = 0.15


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, hex_color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(hex_color)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_GREY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_TITLE
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_hex=WHITE, border_hex=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_hex)
    if border_hex:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_hex)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, accent_color=ORANGE_ACCENT):
    bar_width = Inches(0.35)
    bar_height = Inches(0.06)
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.2), bar_width, bar_height)
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.85), Inches(1.15), Inches(3), Inches(0.4),
                             label_text, font_size=12, bold=True, color=MEDIUM_GREY)


def add_footer(slide, page_number):
    footer_text = f"Partenariat Mondial de Vaccination — {page_number}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(3.5)), Inches(6.7), Inches(2.8), Inches(0.3),
                 footer_text, font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GREY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)


def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(prs, slide, WHITE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(1.8), Inches(9), Inches(1.5),
                 "Partenariat Mondial de Vaccination", font_size=40, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(3.6), Inches(7), Inches(1.2),
                 "Stratégie d'Investissement et Collaboration pour la Santé Globale\nPrésentation Exécutive aux Partenaires C-Suite",
                 font_size=18, color=MEDIUM_GREY)

    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.0), Inches(3), Inches(0.06))
    bar.fill.solid()

    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(5.4), Inches(4), Inches(0.5),
                 "Confidentiel — Usage Interne Uniquement", font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GREY)

    card_width = Inches(3.5)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(CARD_PADDING), y_pos + Inches(CARD_PADDING),
                     card_width - Inches(CARD_PADDING * 2), Inches(0.5),
                     title_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_GREY)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(CARD_PADDING), y_pos + Inches(0.7),

    add_footer(slide, "2")

def main():

if __name__ == "__main__":

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.4)

NAVY = RGBColor(10, 35, 66)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(245, 245, 245)
ACCENT_BLUE = RGBColor(30, 136, 229)
GOLD = RGBColor(255, 215, 0)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(80, 80, 80)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(150, 150, 150)

FONT_HEADING = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
CARD_BG = RGBColor(248, 250, 252)
CARD_BORDER = RGBColor(200, 210, 220)


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex="#0A2342"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = font_name
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=CARD_BORDER):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=14, bold=True, color=NAVY, font_name=FONT_HEADING)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7), body, font_size=11, color=DARK_GRAY)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=16, color=NAVY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(8), Inches(0.5))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=15):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.0), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.333), Inches(0.4), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.1), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.2), "Image Placeholder", font_size=10, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def safe_set_title(slide, text):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8), text, font_size=28, bold=True, color=NAVY, font_name=FONT_HEADING)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.6), "FY 2024 Performance Review", font_size=24, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# ── Deck Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Social_Analytics.pptx"

PALETTE = {
    "primary": RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x4A),
    "secondary": RGBColor(0x0D, 0x94, 0x88),
    "accent": RGBColor(0xF5, 0x9E, 0x0B),
    "success": RGBColor(0x10, 0xB9, 0x81),
    "danger": RGBColor(0xEF, 0x44, 0x44),
    "neutral": RGBColor(0x6B, 0x72, 0x80),
    "light_bg": RGBColor(0xF8, 0xFA, 0xFC),
    "white": RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF),
    "card_bg": RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF),
}

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.15)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, value, subtitle="", accent_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["card_bg"]
    if accent_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = accent_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_title.add_run()
    run_t.text = title
    run_t.font.size = Pt(11)
    run_t.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]
    run_t.font.bold = False

    p_value = tf.add_paragraph()
    p_value.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run_v = p_value.add_run()
    run_v.text = value
    run_v.font.size = Pt(28)
    run_v.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
    run_v.font.bold = True

    if subtitle:
        p_sub = tf.add_paragraph()
        p_sub.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run_s = p_sub.add_run()
        run_s.text = subtitle
        run_s.font.size = Pt(10)
        run_s.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["secondary"]

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["secondary"]
    run.font.bold = True


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.2), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.6), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    run.font.size = Pt(8)
    run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
        shape.line.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.paragraphs[0].alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = tf.paragraphs[0].add_run()
        run.text = "Image"
        run.font.size = Pt(10)
        run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]


# ── Slide Builders ────────────────────────────────────────────────

    p1 = tf.add_paragraph()

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    val_axis = chart.value_axis
    val_axis.has_title = True
    val_axis.axis_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run().text = "Weekly Conversions"

    add_footer(slide, 7, 8)


def slide_08_recommendations(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#F8FAFC")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Key Insights & Recommendations"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(32)
                run.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]
                run.font.bold = True

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.15), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.4),
                 "Strategic actions for Q4 2024 based on Q3 performance data",
                 font_size=13, color=PALETTE["neutral"])

    recommendations = [
        ("Scale Video Production", "Increase short-form video output by 50%. Reels and Stories drive the highest engagement rates across all platforms."),
        ("Invest in TikTok Ads", "TikTok CPM is 40% lower than Instagram. Allocate additional $25K to TikTok paid campaigns for Q4 testing."),
        ("Optimize Posting Schedule", "Peak engagement occurs between 6-9 PM EST. Shift 70% of scheduled posts to this window."),
        ("Leverage UGC Campaigns", "User-generated content generates 3x more engagement than branded content. Launch a branded hashtag campaign."),
        ("A/B Test Landing Pages", "Current conversion rate of 3.1% has room for improvement. Run A/B tests on checkout flow and landing page copy."),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(4)
    card_height = Inches(0.95)
    gap_y = Inches(0.12)
    start_x = Inches(0.6)
    y_start = Inches(1.75)

    for i, (title, desc) in enumerate(recommendations):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_width + CARD_GAP)
        y = y_start + row * (card_height + gap_y)

        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, card_width, card_height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = PALETTE["white"]
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True

        p_num = tf.paragraphs[0]
        r_num = p_num.add_run()
        r_num.text = f"{i + 1}. "
        r_num.font.size = Pt(13)
        r_num.font.bold = True
        r_num.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["secondary"]

        r_title = p_num.add_run()
        r_title.text = title
        r_title.font.size = Pt(13)
        r_title.font.bold = True
        r_title.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["primary"]

        p_desc = tf.add_paragraph()
        r_desc = p_desc.add_run()
        r_desc.text = desc
        r_desc.font.size = Pt(10)
        r_desc.font.color.rgb = PALETTE["neutral"]

    # Bottom note
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(6.75), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.3),
                 "Prepared by Marketing Analytics Team | Next review: October 15, 2024",
                 font_size=9, color=PALETTE["neutral"], alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 8, 8)


# ── Main ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_03_platform_performance(prs)
    slide_04_engagement_trends(prs)
    slide_05_content_performance(prs)
    slide_06_audience_demographics(prs)
    slide_07_roi_metrics(prs)
    slide_08_recommendations(prs)

    prs.save(OUTPUT_FILE)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

DARK_BG = "#1a1a2e"
DARK_BG_ALT = "#16213e"
LIGHT_CARD = "#ffffff"
LIGHT_CARD_ALT = "#f8f9fa"
ACCENT_RED = "#e74c3c"
ACCENT_BLUE = "#3498db"
WHITE_TEXT = "#ffffff"
GRAY_TEXT = "#bdc3c7"
DARK_GRAY = "#2d3436"
LIGHT_ACCENT = "#0f3460"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_PRIMARY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = WHITE_TEXT
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=LIGHT_CARD, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top):
    label_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6))
    label_shape.fill.solid()
    label_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)
    label_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top - Inches(0.02), Inches(4), Inches(0.6), text, font_size=14, bold=True, color=ACCENT_RED)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.3), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=10, color=GRAY_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_CARD_ALT)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_BLUE)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.6), "画像", font_size=14, color=ACCENT_BLUE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    hex_str = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_str[0:2], 16), int(hex_str[2:4], 16), int(hex_str[4:6], 16))


GOLD = hex_to_rgb("#D4AF37")
BLACK = hex_to_rgb("#0A0A0A")
DARK_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#2C2C2C")
WHITE = hex_to_rgb("#FFFFFF")
LIGHT_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#F5F5F5")
MEDIUM_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("#888888")


def set_slide_background(slide, bg_color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=DARK_GRAY, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left=Inches(0.6), top=Inches(0.4)):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top + Inches(0.15), Inches(0.8), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(6), Inches(0.4), text, font_size=12, bold=True, color=GOLD)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=18):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(7.05), Inches(3), Inches(0.3), "LUXURY ESTATES", font_size=9, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.3), Inches(7.05), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, alt_text="Image"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
    shape.line.color.rgb = GOLD
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + (height - Inches(0.3)), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), alt_text, font_size=10, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_decorative_line(slide, left, top, width, vertical=False):
    if vertical:
        line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, Pt(2), Inches(1.5))
    else:
        line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()


def create_chart(slide, chart_type, left, top, width, height, title, categories, series_data):
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_type, left, top, width, height, series_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    if title:
        chart.has_title = True
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = title
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(12)
        chart.chart_title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = WHITE
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    if hasattr(plot, "has_data_labels"):
        plot.has_data_labels = True
    return chart

    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(1))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "What our valued clients say about their experience", font_size=13, bold=False, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    testimonials = [
        ("Sarah Mitchell", "CEO, TechVentures Inc.", "Their attention to detail and market knowledge is unmatched. Found my dream penthouse in Manhattan within weeks."),
        ("James Chen", "Investment Banker", "Exceptional service from start to finish. The team guided me through every step of acquiring my Malibu villa."),
        ("Elena Rodriguez", "Art Collector", "I have worked with many agencies, but none compare to the level of professionalism and discretion provided here.")
    ]
    for i, (name, title, quote) in enumerate(testimonials):
        x = Inches(0.6) + Inches(i * 4.2)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.8), Inches(3.9), Inches(4.5))

        stars = "★★★★★"
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.15), Inches(1.95), Inches(3.6), Inches(0.3), stars, font_size=12, bold=False, color=GOLD)
        add_decorative_line(slide, x + Inches(0.3), Inches(2.3), Inches(3.3))

        quote_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.15), Inches(2.45), Inches(3.6), Inches(2.0))
        tf = quote_box.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.oxml.ns import qn
import os

# --- Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

# Nature-inspired palette: green and blue
COLOR_DARK_GREEN = RGBColor(27, 94, 32)
COLOR_MID_GREEN = RGBColor(46, 125, 50)
COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN = RGBColor(186, 230, 153)
COLOR_PALE_GREEN = RGBColor(232, 245, 233)
COLOR_DARK_BLUE = RGBColor(13, 71, 161)
COLOR_MID_BLUE = RGBColor(30, 136, 229)
COLOR_LIGHT_BLUE = RGBColor(187, 222, 251)
COLOR_PALE_BLUE = RGBColor(227, 242, 253)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(60, 60, 60)
COLOR_MID_GRAY = RGBColor(120, 120, 120)
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(230, 230, 230)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#E8F5E9"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_PRIMARY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color if color else COLOR_DARK_GRAY
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, w, h, title, body, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = title
    run.font.size = Pt(14)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GREEN
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        run2 = p2.add_run()
        run2.text = body
        run2.font.size = Pt(11)
        run2.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MID_GRAY
        run2.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, x, y, font_size=36, color=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, Inches(10), Inches(1.5))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = color if color else COLOR_DARK_GREEN
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(10.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.4))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MID_GRAY
    run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_PALE_GREEN
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_MID_GREEN
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
        tf = shape.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Immagine"
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MID_GREEN
        run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY


def add_decorative_circle(slide, cx, cy, radius, color):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, cx - Inches(radius), cy - Inches(radius), Inches(radius * 2), Inches(radius * 2))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_horizontal_line(slide, x1, y, x2, color=COLOR_MID_GREEN, width_pt=2):
    connector = slide.shapes.add_connector(1, x1, y, x2, y)  # MSO_CONNECTOR.STRAIGHT = 1
    line = connector.line
    line.color.rgb = color
    line.width = Pt(width_pt)


def add_bullet_list(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=13):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.space_after = Pt(6)
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY
        run.font.name = FONT_SECONDARY


def add_title_with_bar(slide, title_text, subtitle_text=None):
    if slide.shapes.title is not None:
        slide.shapes.title.text = ""
        tf = slide.shapes.title.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = title_text
        run.font.size = Pt(32)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GREEN
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    if subtitle_text:
        add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(1.6), Inches(10), Inches(0.8), subtitle_text, font_size=16, color=COLOR_MID_GRAY)

def create_slide_5_energy_mix(prs):

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Carbone", "Gas Naturale", "Idroelettrico", "Solare", "Eolico", "Nucleare", "Altro"]

        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.8), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5), chart_data
    )

    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5),
        "Il mix energetico attuale mostra ancora una forte dipendenza dai combustibili fossili.\n\n"
        "• Carbone: 23% — in calo ma significativo\n"

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


# --- Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_BLUE = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x4F, 0x8A)
SECONDARY_TEAL = RGBColor(0x2E, 0x8B, 0x57)
ACCENT_GOLD = RGBColor(0xD9, 0xA0, 0x2C)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x66, 0x66, 0x66)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF5, 0xF5)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
SOFT_BLUE_BG = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEE, 0xF4)

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_HEADER = "Arial"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT
CARD_PADDING = Inches(0.2)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=WHITE):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex) if isinstance(color_hex, str) else color_hex


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color=DARK_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=WHITE,
             border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.12)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.12)

    if title:
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = title
        p.font.size = Pt(13)
        p.font.bold = True
        p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
        p.font.name = FONT_HEADER
        p.space_after = Pt(6)

    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        p2.text = body
        p2.font.size = Pt(10.5)
        p2.font.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        p2.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=11, color=ACCENT_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, Inches(0.08), Inches(0.35))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top - Inches(0.02), Inches(4), Inches(0.35),
                 text, font_size=font_size, bold=True, color=color, font_name=FONT_HEADER)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total_slides):
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.28), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.25),
                 f"District Budget Proposal  |  Slide {slide_num} of {total_slides}",
                 font_size=9, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xCC, 0xCC, 0xCC)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.15),
                     width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), "Image Placeholder",
                     font_size=10, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_table(slide, rows, cols, data, left, top, width, height):
    table_shape = slide.shapes.add_table(rows, cols, left, top, width, height)
    table = table_shape.table

    for i in range(rows):
        for j in range(cols):
            cell = table.cell(i, j)
            cell.text = str(data[i][j]) if data and i < len(data) and j < len(data[i]) else ""
            for paragraph in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
                paragraph.font.size = Pt(10)
                paragraph.font.name = FONT_BODY
                paragraph.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER

    # Style header row
    for j in range(cols):
        cell = table.cell(0, j)
        cell.fill.solid()
        cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
        for p in cell.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.color.rgb = WHITE
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.size = Pt(10.5)

    return table_shape


def add_bullet_list(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=12):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for idx, item in enumerate(items):
        if idx == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.text = f"• {item}"
        p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        p.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        p.font.name = FONT_BODY
        p.space_after = Pt(4)


def add_numbered_list(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=12):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for idx, item in enumerate(items):
        if idx == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.text = f"{idx + 1}. {item}"
        p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        p.font.color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        p.font.name = FONT_BODY
        p.space_after = Pt(6)


# --- Slide Builders ---

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(1.8), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(1.0),
                 "District Budget Proposal", font_size=36, bold=True, color=WHITE,
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, font_name=FONT_HEADER)

    gold_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.2), Inches(3.0),
                                       Inches(3.0), Inches(0.04))
    gold_line.fill.solid()
    gold_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    gold_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.3), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(3.0), Inches(0.6),
                 "FY 2025–2026 Annual Operating & Capital Budget", font_size=18, color=RGBColor(0xCC, 0xDD, 0xEE),
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(3.0), Inches(0.6),
                 "Presented to the Board of Education", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(0xAA, 0xBB, 0xCC),
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(5.2), CONTENT_WIDTH - Inches(3.0), Inches(0.6),
                 "Prepared by the Office of the Superintendent", font_size=12, color=RGBColor(0x99, 0xAA, 0xBB),
                 alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1, 9)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "BUDGET OVERVIEW")

    metrics = [
        ("Total Revenue", "$487.2M"),
        ("Total Expenditure", "$462.8M"),
        ("Net Position", "+$24.4M"),
        ("Reserve Ratio", "12.3%"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(2.5)
    card_h = Inches(1.6)
    gap = Inches(0.2)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 4 * card_w - 3 * gap) / 2

    for idx, (label, value) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + idx * (card_w + gap)
        y = Inches(1.85)
        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, label, value, bg_color=SOFT_BLUE_BG, border_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.7), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(2.8),
                 "The proposed budget reflects a balanced approach to maintaining educational quality while addressing fiscal responsibility. Key highlights include a 3.2% increase in revenue driven by property tax reassessment and state funding adjustments, alongside targeted investments in STEM programs, facility modernization, and staff retention initiatives.",
                 font_size=12, color=DARK_GRAY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.8), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.4),
                 "The district maintains a healthy financial position with reserves exceeding state-mandated minimums and no projected deficit for the upcoming fiscal year.",
                 font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 9)


def slide_03_revenue_sources(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Revenue Sources & Projections"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.font.size = Pt(28)
            p.font.bold = True
            p.font.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), "REVENUE BREAKDOWN")

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Property Tax", "State Aid", "Federal Grants", "Other Revenue"]
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2025-26", (42, 31, 14, 13))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    chart.legend.font.size = Pt(10)

    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(9)
    data_labels.number_format = "0%"
    data_labels.show_percentage = True
    data_labels.show_value = False

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(6.8), Inches(1.7), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.5),
                 "Revenue Composition\n\n"
                 "Property Tax (42%)\nStable base revenue with 2.1% increase from reassessment.\n\n"
                 "State Aid (31%)\nIncreased by $8.4M due to formula adjustments.\n\n"
                 "Federal Grants (14%)\nPrimarily Title I and IDEA funding.\n\n"
                 "Other Revenue (13%)\nIncludes fees, investments, and auxiliary services.",
                 font_size=10.5, color=DARK_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 9)

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_01_title(prs)
    slide_02_executive_summary(prs)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    hex_str = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_str[0:2], 16), int(hex_str[2:4], 16), int(hex_str[4:6], 16))


PRIMARY_BLUE = hex_to_rgb("1B3A5C")
SECONDARY_TEAL = hex_to_rgb("2E86AB")
ACCENT_GOLD = hex_to_rgb("F4A261")
LIGHT_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("F0F0F0")
WHITE = hex_to_rgb("FFFFFF")
DARK_TEXT = hex_to_rgb("2D2D2D")
MEDIUM_GRAY = hex_to_rgb("8C8C8C")
CARD_BG = hex_to_rgb("FAFBFC")
BORDER_BLUE = hex_to_rgb("1B3A5C")


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor as _RGBColor
    if isinstance(color_hex, _RGBColor):
        rgb_val = color_hex
    else:
        rgb_val = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = rgb_val


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_color=DARK_TEXT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = font_color
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=BORDER_BLUE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=16, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.7), body, font_size=13, font_color=DARK_TEXT)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, section_number):
    num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
    num_shape.fill.solid()
    num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_GOLD
    num_shape.line.color.rgb = WHITE
    num_shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    tf = num_shape.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = str(section_number)
    run.font.size = Pt(18)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = WHITE
    run.font.name = "Calibri"

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.3), Inches(0.45), Inches(6), Inches(0.5), label_text, font_size=20, bold=True, font_color=PRIMARY_BLUE)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=22):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(8.5), Inches(7.1), Inches(1.3), Inches(0.3), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=10, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT, font_color=MEDIUM_GRAY)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = MEDIUM_GRAY
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(height / 2 - Inches(0.15)), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3), "Image Placeholder", font_size=12, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER, font_color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

Develop a higher education orientation deck for prospective students. Save the presentation as 'University_Orientation.pptx', write everything in English, and use 16:9 Widescreen landscape slides. The design should be colorful and academic with primary colors and playful icons. Do not make any external API requests or scrape the web; hardcode all text and data values locally. You must use XL_CHART_TYPE when defining chart types. Additionally, always implement a null check for slide.shapes.title before assigning to its .text field.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = 10.0
SLIDE_HEIGHT = 7.5

PRIMARY_BLUE = "#1E3A8A"
ACCENT_GOLD = "#F59E0B"
SECONDARY_TEAL = "#0D9488"
LIGHT_BG = "#F8FAFC"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
DARK_TEXT = "#1E293B"
MEDIUM_GRAY = "#64748B"
CARD_BG = "#FFFFFF"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=LIGHT_BG):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=PRIMARY_BLUE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    if title:
        run.text = title
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        p2.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        r2 = p2.add_run()
        r2.text = "\n" + body
        r2.font.size = Pt(11)
        r2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GRAY)
        r2.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=14, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(8), Pt(font_size))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_footer(slide, text="© 2025 University Name | www.university.edu"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.6), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 0.4), Inches(8.8), Pt(12))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GRAY)
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height, label="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#E2E8F0")
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#CBD5E1")
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
        tf = shape.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = label
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GRAY)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_banner(slide, top=0, height=Inches(1.8), color_hex=PRIMARY_BLUE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), top, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH), height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_circle_icon(slide, left, top, size=Inches(1.2), color_hex=PRIMARY_BLUE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, left, top, size, size)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_accent_line(slide, left, top, width, color_hex=ACCENT_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Pt(4))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_title_with_check(slide, text):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        run = title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].add_run()
        run.text = text
        run.font.size = Pt(32)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_BLUE)
        run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.5), Inches(8.8), Inches(1.2), text, font_size=32, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_BLUE)


def slide_01_welcome(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_banner(slide, top=Inches(0), height=Inches(2.5))

    # Decorative circles
    add_circle_icon(slide, Inches(-0.3), Inches(-0.3), size=Inches(1.8), color_hex="#3B82F6")
    add_circle_icon(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - 1.5), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 2.5), size=Inches(2.0), color_hex="#FBBF24")

    # University name badge
    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(4.3), Inches(0.6), Inches(1.4), Inches(1.4))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_GOLD)
    badge.line.fill.background()
    tf = badge.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "EST.\n2025"
    run.font.size = Pt(14)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_BLUE)

    # Title
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(1.5), "Welcome to\nUniversity Name", font_size=42, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Subtitle
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.6), Inches(7.0), Inches(0.8), "Your Journey Starts Here — Explore Our Campus & Programs", font_size=20, color="#BFDBFE", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Decorative line
    add_accent_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(3.0), ACCENT_GOLD)

    # Bottom info bar
    bottom_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 1.2), Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH), Inches(1.2))
    bottom_bar.fill.solid()
    bottom_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#1E40AF")
    bottom_bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 1.0), Inches(8.0), Inches(0.5), "Open House: March 15, 2025 | Admissions Open Now", font_size=14, color="#BFDBFE", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, text="© 2025 University Name | www.university.edu")


def slide_02_campus_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

DARK_GREY = "#2D2D2D"
MEDIUM_GREY = "#5A5A5A"
LIGHT_GREY = "#E8E8E8"
VERY_LIGHT_GREY = "#F5F5F5"
ACCENT_RED = "#C62828"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    else:
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=None, border_color=None):
    if bg_color is None:
        bg_color = WHITE
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p1 = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run1 = p1.add_run()
    run1.text = title
    run1.font.size = Pt(16)
    run1.font.bold = True
    run1.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(DARK_GREY)

    if body:
        tf.add_paragraph()
        p2 = tf.paragraphs[1]
        run2 = p2.add_run()
        run2.text = body
        run2.font.size = Pt(11)
        run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=10):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_RED)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(
            MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height
        )
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(LIGHT_GREY)
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

        tf = shape.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Bildplatzhalter"
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MEDIUM_GREY)


def slide_01_title(prs):

    for i, (date_text, desc_text) in enumerate(milestones):

        run_main.text = desc_text
        run_main.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_main.font.bold = True
        run_main.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)

    slide_05_strategies(prs)
    slide_06_roadmap(prs)

    prs.save("Supply_Chain_Optimization.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.8)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.5)

COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY = RGBColor(0, 139, 139)
COLOR_TEAL_DARK = RGBColor(0, 77, 77)
COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT = RGBColor(224, 242, 241)
COLOR_GRAY_TEXT = RGBColor(51, 51, 51)
COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY = RGBColor(102, 102, 102)
COLOR_SUCCESS_GREEN = RGBColor(39, 174, 96)
COLOR_PHASE_DISCOVERY = RGBColor(189, 195, 199)
COLOR_PHASE_PRECLINICAL = RGBColor(116, 185, 255)
COLOR_PHASE_I = RGBColor(0, 139, 139)
COLOR_PHASE_II = RGBColor(46, 204, 113)
COLOR_PHASE_III = RGBColor(241, 196, 15)
COLOR_PHASE_REG = RGBColor(231, 76, 60)

FONT_TITLE = "Arial"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=FONT_BODY):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        p.font.color.rgb = color
    else:
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_GRAY_TEXT
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.25)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.25)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.15)

    if title:
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = title
        p.font.size = Pt(13)
        p.font.bold = True
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_DARK
        p.font.name = FONT_TITLE
        p.space_after = Pt(6)

    if body:
        p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
        p2.text = body
        p2.font.size = Pt(10)
        p2.font.color.rgb = COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY
        p2.font.name = FONT_BODY
        p2.space_before = Pt(4)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, x, y):
    pill = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(1.8), Inches(0.3))
    pill.fill.solid()
    pill.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT
    pill.line.fill.background()
    tf = pill.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = label_text
    p.font.size = Pt(9)
    p.font.bold = True
    p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY
    p.font.name = FONT_BODY
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    return pill


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(12.0), Inches(7.05), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.3),
                 f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_LIGHT
        ph.line.color.rgb = COLOR_TEAL_PRIMARY
        ph.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        tf = ph.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = alt_text
        p.font.size = Pt(11)
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_SECONDARY_GRAY
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────
