from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

COLOR_DARK_BROWN = RGBColor(62, 39, 35)
COLOR_MEDIUM_BROWN = RGBColor(109, 76, 65)
COLOR_WARM_TAN = RGBColor(161, 136, 127)
COLOR_LIGHT_BEIGE = RGBColor(239, 235, 233)
COLOR_CREAM = RGBColor(250, 240, 230)
COLOR_ACCENT_GREEN = RGBColor(85, 139, 47)
COLOR_GOLD = RGBColor(255, 179, 0)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_BLACK = RGBColor(0, 0, 0)
COLOR_DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(64, 64, 64)

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.5)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT


def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, text, x, y, width, height, font_size=14, bold=False, color=COLOR_BLACK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = color
    p.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, title, body, x, y, w, h, bg_color=COLOR_CREAM, border_color=COLOR_MEDIUM_BROWN):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    p_title.text = title
    p_title.font.size = Pt(14)
    p_title.font.bold = True
    p_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_BROWN

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.5), w - Inches(0.4), h - Inches(0.6))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    tf_body.word_wrap = True
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    p_body.text = body
    p_body.font.size = Pt(11)
    p_body.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label, x, y, width, height, color=COLOR_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, text="Proposta de Novo Desenvolvimento", page_num=1):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(MARGIN_LEFT, SLIDE_HEIGHT - Inches(0.35), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.2))
    tf = footer_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = f"{text} | Página {page_num}"
    p.font.size = Pt(9)
    p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, w, h):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, w, h)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_BEIGE
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y + h / 2 - Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.text = "Imagem"
        p.font.size = Pt(14)
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


def add_bullet_text(slide, bullets, x, y, width, height, font_size=12):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, bullet in enumerate(bullets):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.text = f"• {bullet}"
        p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        p.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY
        p.space_after = Pt(6)


def add_numbered_item(slide, number, title, body, x, y, width):
    num_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, y + Inches(0.1), Inches(0.35), Inches(0.35))
    num_box.fill.solid()
    num_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_GOLD
    num_box.line.fill.background()

    num_text = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.08), y + Inches(0.12), Inches(0.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf_num = num_text.text_frame
    p_num = tf_num.paragraphs[0]
    p_num.text = str(number)
    p_num.font.size = Pt(14)
    p_num.font.bold = True
    p_num.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.5), y, width - Inches(0.7), Inches(0.3))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    p_title.text = title
    p_title.font.size = Pt(14)
    p_title.font.bold = True
    p_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_BROWN

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.5), y + Inches(0.35), width - Inches(0.7), Inches(0.6))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    p_body.text = body
    p_body.font.size = Pt(11)
    p_body.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GRAY


def add_stat_card(slide, value, label, x, y, w, h):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_CREAM
    shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    val_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.4))
    tf_val = val_box.text_frame
    p_val = tf_val.paragraphs[0]
    p_val.text = value
    p_val.font.size = Pt(28)
    p_val.font.bold = True
    p_val.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_BROWN

    lbl_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.55), w - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf_lbl = lbl_box.text_frame
    p_lbl = tf_lbl.paragraphs[0]
    p_lbl.text = label
    p_lbl.font.size = Pt(11)
    p_lbl.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WARM_TAN


def add_bar_chart(slide, chart_type, x, y, w, h, categories, series_name, values):
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories
    chart_data.add_series(series_name, values)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(chart_type, x, y, w, h, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    chart.has_title = False

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

COLORS = {
    "silver": "#C0C0C0",
    "red": "#E63946",
    "dark_gray": "#2B2D42",
    "white": "#FFFFFF",
    "light_gray": "#F8F9FA",
    "accent_blue": "#4A90E2",
}

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_WIDTH = Inches(3.5)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.8)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.25)


# ── Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18,
                 color="#2B2D42", bold=False, alignment=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if alignment is not None:
        p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", bg_color="#FFFFFF"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#E0E0E0")
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    if title or body:
        tf = shape.text_frame
        tf.word_wrap = True
        tf.margin_left = Inches(0.15)
        tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
        tf.margin_top = Inches(0.12)
        tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.12)
        if title:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
            p.text = title
            run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
            run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
            run.font.size = Pt(14)
            run.font.bold = True
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(COLORS["dark_gray"])
        if body:
            p2 = tf.add_paragraph()
            p2.text = body
            run2 = p2.runs[0] if p2.runs else p2.add_run()
            run2.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
            run2.font.size = Pt(11)
            run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#555555")
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text):
    card = add_card(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.5),
                    title=label_text, bg_color=COLORS["red"])
    tf = card.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(COLORS["white"])
    return card


def add_footer(slide, text="EV Transition Roadmap | Confidential", font_size=10):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.6), Inches(7.0), Inches(4.5), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(COLORS["silver"])


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#F0F0F0")
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(COLORS["silver"])
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.6), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4),
                     "Image Placeholder", font_size=12, color="#999999")


def add_shape(slide, shape_type, left, top, width, height, fill_color=None, line_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(shape_type, left, top, width, height)
    if fill_color:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(fill_color)
    else:
        shape.fill.background()
    if line_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(line_color)
    return shape


def add_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2, color="#E63946", width=0.5):
    connector = slide.shapes.add_connector(1, x1, y1, x2, y2)  # MSO_CONNECTOR.STRAIGHT
    connector.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    connector.line.width = Pt(width)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

def build_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["dark_gray"])

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(2.0), Inches(11.3), Inches(1.5),
                 "电动汽车转型路线图", font_size=48, color=COLORS["white"], bold=True)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(3.6), Inches(11.3), Inches(1.2),
                 "经销商集团战略升级与电动化转型指南", font_size=24, color=COLORS["silver"])

    # decorative red line
    add_shape(slide, MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.06), fill_color=COLORS["red"])

    add_footer(slide, text="EV Transition Roadmap | 2024-2030", font_size=11)


def build_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "执行摘要"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "执行摘要", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    # Key stats cards
    stats = [
        ("2030年预测销量", "增长450%", COLORS["red"]),
        ("市场份额目标", "70%电动化", COLORS["accent_blue"]),
        ("投资回报率", "18-25%", COLORS["dark_gray"]),
    ]
    for i, (title, value, accent) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 4.3)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title=title, body=value, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Intro paragraph
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.8), Inches(12), Inches(2.5),
                 "本路线图为汽车经销商提供全面的电动化转型指导，涵盖市场趋势分析、分阶段实施策略、财务规划及风险管理。通过系统化的转型路径，经销商可在未来十年内实现业务模式的全面升级，抓住电动汽车市场的巨大增长机遇。",
                 font_size=14, color="#555555")

    add_footer(slide)


def build_market_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLORS["light_gray"])

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "市场概览"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),
                     "市场概览", font_size=36, color=COLORS["dark_gray"], bold=True)

    # Stat cards
    stats = [
        ("全球EV销量", "1400万辆/年", COLORS["red"]),

    ]
    for i, (title, value, accent) in enumerate(stats):
        x = Inches(0.6 + i * 4.3)
        add_card(slide, x, Inches(1.5), CARD_WIDTH, CARD_HEIGHT, title=title, body=value, bg_color=COLORS["white"])

    # Chart: EV sales trend
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["2020", "2021", "2022", "2023", "2024", "2025", "2026", "2027", "2028", "2029", "2030"]
    chart_data.add_series("全球EV销量 (百万辆)", (10, 14, 22, 32, 45, 65, 90, 120, 155, 195, 240))

    left = Inches(0.6)
    top = Inches(3.8)
    width = Inches(12.1)
    height = Inches(3.0)
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)

    add_footer(slide)

def build_timeline(prs):

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3), Inches(12), Inches(0.8),

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

COLOR_DARK_GREEN = RGBColor(46, 125, 50)
COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN = RGBColor(76, 175, 80)
COLOR_LIGHT_GREEN = RGBColor(165, 214, 167)
COLOR_BROWN = RGBColor(141, 110, 99)
COLOR_CREAM = RGBColor(255, 248, 225)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(33, 33, 33)
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(200, 200, 200)


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFF8E1"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_shape(slide, shape_type, left, top, width, height, fill_color=None, line_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(shape_type, left, top, width, height)
    if fill_color:
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = fill_color
    else:
        shape.fill.background()
    if line_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = line_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)
    return shape


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text, body_text, accent_color=None):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    if accent_color:
        card_shape.fill.solid()
        card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = accent_color
    else:
        card_shape.fill.background()
    card_shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
    card_shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_title = p_title.add_run()
    run_title.text = title_text
    run_title.font.size = Pt(12)
    run_title.font.bold = True
    if accent_color:
        run_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    else:
        run_title.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GREEN

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_body = p_body.add_run()
    run_body.text = body_text
    run_body.font.size = Pt(10)
    if accent_color:
        run_body.font.color.rgb = COLOR_WHITE
    else:
        run_body.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_TEXT

    return card_shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, position="center"):
    label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3), Inches(9), Inches(0.4))
    tf = label_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN
    if position == "center":
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER


def add_footer(prs, slide, page_number):
    footer_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(8.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf = footer_box.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{page_number} / 8"
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = COLOR_MEDIUM_GREEN
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        label_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.15), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = label_box.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Bild-Platzhalter"
        run.font.size = Pt(10)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_DARK_GREEN

    chart_data.add_series("Konventionell", (100, 60, 45, 35))

    plot = chart.plots[0]

    series_0 = plot.series[0]

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.maximum_scale = 120
    value_axis.has_title = True

    category_axis = chart.category_axis

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt, Emu
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os

# ── Deck Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Sustainable_Invest.pptx"
TOTAL_PAGES = 18

PALETTE = {
    "forest_green": "#1B4332",
    "sage":       "#95D5B2",
    "cream":      "#FEFAE0",
    "olive":      "#A3B18A",
    "charcoal":   "#2C3E50",
    "gold":       "#D4AF37",
    "white":      "#FFFFFF",
    "light_green":"#D8F3DC",
}

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SIZE_TITLE = 36
FONT_SIZE_SUBTITLE = 18
FONT_SIZE_BODY = 14
FONT_SIZE_SMALL = 12
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.25)

# ── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False,
                 color="#2C3E50", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name="Calibri"):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = font_name
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color="#FFFFFF", border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    if border_color:
        line = shape.line
        line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
        line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left, top):
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.5), text, 28, True, PALETTE["forest_green"])
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top + Inches(0.6), Inches(1.5), Pt(3))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["gold"])
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(prs, slide, page_num):
    footer_shape = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.6), Inches(7.1), Inches(4), Inches(0.3))
    tf = footer_shape.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"Sustainable Investment Portfolio  |  {page_num} / {TOTAL_PAGES}"
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["olive"])
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY

    right_footer = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(9.5), Inches(7.1), Inches(3.2), Inches(0.3))
    tf2 = right_footer.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()
    run2.text = "CONFIDENTIAL"
    run2.font.size = Pt(10)
    run2.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["olive"])
    run2.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height, label="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        ph = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        ph.fill.solid()
        ph.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["light_green"])
        ph.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PALETTE["sage"])
        ph.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.3),
                     width - Inches(0.2), Inches(0.6), label, 14, False, PALETTE["forest_green"], PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = 10.0
SLIDE_HEIGHT = 5.625

BG_DARK = "#0a0a0f"
BG_CARD = "#12121a"
BG_ACCENT = "#1a1a2e"
NEON_CYAN = "#00d4ff"
NEON_MAGENTA = "#ff00aa"
NEON_GREEN = "#00ff88"
NEON_PURPLE = "#a855f7"

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Calibri"

MARGIN_LEFT = 0.5
MARGIN_RIGHT = 0.5
CARD_WIDTH = 2.8
CARD_HEIGHT = 1.2
CARD_GAP = 0.3


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=BG_DARK):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=12, bold=False, color_hex="#ffffff", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body="", accent_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BG_CARD)
    if accent_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
    else:
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#333344")
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.1), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff")
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.45), width - Inches(0.3), height - Inches(0.55), body, font_size=11, color_hex="#b0b0c0")

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, label_text, accent_color=NEON_CYAN):
    box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, Inches(0.08), Inches(0.6))
    box.fill.solid()
    box.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    box.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.25), top - Inches(0.1), Inches(3), Inches(0.8), label_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color_hex="#ffffff")


def add_footer(slide, slide_number, total_slides=15):
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(MARGIN_LEFT), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 0.25), Inches(3), Inches(0.2), f"Series B Pitch Deck", font_size=9, color_hex="#444466")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_RIGHT - 1.5), Inches(SLIDE_HEIGHT - 0.25), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.2), f"{slide_number} / {total_slides}", font_size=9, color_hex="#444466", alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BG_ACCENT)
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#333344")
        shape.line.width = Pt(1)


def create_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BG_DARK)

    accent_line_left = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.04), Inches(1.8))
    accent_line_left.fill.solid()
    accent_line_left.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NEON_CYAN)
    accent_line_left.line.fill.background()

    accent_line_right = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(7.46), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.04), Inches(1.8))
    accent_line_right.fill.solid()
    accent_line_right.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(NEON_MAGENTA)
    accent_line_right.line.fill.background()

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Series B Pitch Deck"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
            for run in p.runs:
                run.font.size = Pt(48)
                run.font.bold = True
                run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#ffffff")

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(5), Inches(0.5), "NEXUS AI — Enterprise Analytics Platform", font_size=18, bold=True, color_hex="#b0b0c0", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(5), Inches(0.4), "Confidential — For Qualified Investors Only", font_size=12, color_hex="#666688", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 1)

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import ChartData


# ── Deck Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Hospital_KPIs.pptx"

HEADER_COLOR = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x3A, 0x5C)
ACCENT_COLOR = RGBColor(0x00, 0x79, 0x6B)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
BODY_TEXT = RGBColor(0x2D, 0x2D, 0x2D)
MUTED_TEXT = RGBColor(0x80, 0x80, 0x80)
LIGHT_BG = RGBColor(0xF5, 0xF7, 0xFA)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Arial"

MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_TOP = Inches(0.4)
MARGIN_BOTTOM = Inches(0.4)

CARD_WIDTH = Inches(2.8)
CARD_HEIGHT = Inches(1.6)
CARD_GAP = Inches(0.15)


# ── Helper Functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=BODY_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT, font_name=None):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = font_name or FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, value, subtitle=""):
    card_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    card_shape.fill.solid()
    card_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = CARD_BG
    card_shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)
    card_shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.12), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4), title, font_size=11, bold=True, color=MUTED_TEXT)
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.6), value, font_size=28, bold=True, color=ACCENT_COLOR)

    if subtitle:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.15), top + Inches(1.1), width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4), subtitle, font_size=10, color=MUTED_TEXT)


def add_section_label(slide, text):
    banner = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(2.8), SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(1), Inches(1.5))
    banner.fill.solid()
    banner.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
    banner.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.7), Inches(3.0), Inches(12), Inches(1.2), text, font_size=40, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num):
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.05), SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(1), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)
    line.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.1), Inches(4), Inches(0.35), "Hospital Efficiency KPIs", font_size=9, color=MUTED_TEXT)
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(2), Inches(7.1), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.35), f"Slide {slide_num}", font_size=9, color=MUTED_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEC, 0xF1)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_COLOR
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.4), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.8), "Image Placeholder", font_size=14, color=MUTED_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_line(slide, x1, y1, x2, y2, color=RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0), width=Pt(1)):
    connector = slide.shapes.add_connector(1, x1, y1, x2, y2)
    connector.line.color.rgb = color
    connector.line.width = width


def add_quarterly_trend_chart(slide, title_text, categories, series_list, left, top, width, height):
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories

    for series_name, values in series_list:
        chart_data.add_series(series_name, tuple(values))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = title_text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, left, Inches(0.3), width, Inches(0.5), title_text, font_size=24, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR)

    return chart_frame


def add_clustered_bar_chart(slide, title_text, categories, series_list, left, top, width, height):
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories

    for series_name, values in series_list:
        chart_data.add_series(series_name, tuple(values))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = title_text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, left, Inches(0.3), width, Inches(0.5), title_text, font_size=24, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR)

    return chart_frame


def add_pie_chart(slide, title_text, categories, values, left, top, width, height):
    chart_data = ChartData()
    chart_data.categories = categories
    chart_data.add_series("Satisfaction", tuple(values))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_label_format = plot.data_labels
    data_label_format.show_percentage = True

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = title_text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, left, Inches(0.3), width, Inches(0.5), title_text, font_size=24, bold=True, color=HEADER_COLOR)

    return chart_frame


def add_heatmap_grid(slide, categories_x, categories_y, values, left, top, cell_width, cell_height):
    for row_idx, y_cat in enumerate(categories_y):
        for col_idx, x_cat in enumerate(categories_x):
            val = values[row_idx][col_idx]
            color_val = RGBColor(0x00, 0x79, 0x6B) if val >= 8 else (RGBColor(0xFF, 0xB3, 0x47) if val >= 5 else RGBColor(0xE5, 0x73, 0x73))
            cell = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + col_idx * cell_width, top + row_idx * cell_height, cell_width - Pt(2), cell_height - Pt(2))
            cell.fill.solid()
            cell.fill.fore_color.rgb = color_val
            cell.line.color.rgb = WHITE

            add_text_box(slide, left + col_idx * cell_width + Inches(0.15), top + row_idx * cell_height + Inches(0.3), cell_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.4), str(val), font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    for col_idx, x_cat in enumerate(categories_x):
        add_text_box(slide, left + col_idx * cell_width + Inches(0.15), top - Inches(0.4), cell_width - Inches(0.3), Inches(0.35), x_cat, font_size=12, bold=True, color=DARK_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    for row_idx, y_cat in enumerate(categories_y):
        add_text_box(slide, left - Inches(0.8), top + row_idx * cell_height + Inches(0.3), Inches(0.7), Inches(0.4), y_cat, font_size=12, bold=True, color=DARK_GRAY)


# ── Slide Builders ───────────────────────────────────────────────

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_BLUE = RGBColor(0, 61, 165)
DARK_NAVY = RGBColor(10, 31, 68)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(232, 236, 242)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
ACCENT_TEAL = RGBColor(0, 180, 216)
SUCCESS_GREEN = RGBColor(46, 204, 113)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(120, 130, 140)

FONT_HEADING = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, x, y, w, h, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, w, h)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, w, h, title, body, icon_shape=None):
    card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    card.fill.solid()
    card.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    card.line.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
    card.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=12, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
    body_box = add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.55), w - Inches(0.4), h - Inches(0.7), body, font_size=10, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    if icon_shape:
        icon = slide.shapes.add_shape(icon_shape, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.12), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.3))
        icon.fill.solid()
        icon.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
        icon.line.fill.background()

    return card


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, label_text):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y - Inches(0.02), Inches(4), Inches(0.5), label_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    footer_bg = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    footer_bg.fill.solid()
    footer_bg.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_NAVY
    footer_bg.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(6), Inches(0.3), "Assurance Confiance — Votre Partenaire de Confiance", font_size=9, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, w, h):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, w, h)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.3), w - Inches(0.2), h - Inches(0.5), "Image / Icône", font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    hex_str = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(hex_str[0:2], 16), int(hex_str[2:4], 16), int(hex_str[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FDFBF7"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color="#2C1810", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color="#FFFFFF", border_color="#D4A843"):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(1, left, top, width, height)  # MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(2)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.25), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_title.add_run()
    run_t.text = title
    run_t.font.size = Pt(14)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.7), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(1.0))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    run_b = p_body.add_run()
    run_b.text = body
    run_b.font.size = Pt(12)
    run_b.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#2C1810")

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, x, y, font_size=14):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, Inches(6), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#D4A843")


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.0), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B2635")


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, left, top, width, height, path, alt_text="Image"):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(1, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#E8E0D4")
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#C4B8A8")
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(height.inches / 2 - 0.3), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = alt_text
        run.font.size = Pt(12)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#8B7355")


def title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

GREEN_DARK = "#1B5E20"
GREEN_PRIMARY = "#2E7D32"
GREEN_LIGHT = "#4CAF50"
GREEN_ACCENT = "#8BC34A"
YELLOW_PRIMARY = "#FFC107"
YELLOW_LIGHT = "#FFEB3B"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
DARK_BG = "#263238"
LIGHT_GRAY = "#F5F5F5"

FONT_NAME = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(prs, slide, color_hex):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, bold=False, color_hex=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    p.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    p.font.bold = bold
    p.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    p.font.name = FONT_NAME
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=GREEN_DARK, border_color=YELLOW_PRIMARY):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(border_color)
    shape.line.width = Pt(2)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4))
    tf_title = title_box.text_frame
    p_title = tf_title.paragraphs[0]
    p_title.text = title
    p_title.font.size = Pt(16)
    p_title.font.bold = True
    p_title.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(YELLOW_PRIMARY)
    p_title.font.name = FONT_NAME

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(0.55), width - Inches(0.6), height - Inches(0.7))
    tf_body = body_box.text_frame
    p_body = tf_body.paragraphs[0]
    p_body.text = body
    p_body.font.size = Pt(12)
    p_body.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    p_body.font.name = FONT_NAME

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, accent_color=YELLOW_PRIMARY):
    bar_width = Inches(0.5)
    bar_height = Inches(0.06)
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.2), Inches(0.8), bar_width, bar_height)
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(accent_color)
    bar.line.fill.background()

    label_box = add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.35), Inches(0.72), Inches(4), Inches(0.3), label_text, font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex=YELLOW_PRIMARY)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=6):
    footer = add_text_box(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), f"{slide_num} / {total}", font_size=10, color_hex="#9E9E9E", alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb("#37474F")
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GREEN_LIGHT)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)

        icon_box = add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.3), "Bild", font_size=14, bold=True, color_hex="#78909C", alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_title_safe(slide, text):
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = text
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), Inches(0.5), Inches(11), Inches(0.8), text, font_size=36, bold=True, color_hex=YELLOW_PRIMARY)

    # Accent line

    # Presenter info

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.7), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Q3 2025 — Confidential", font_size=14, color_hex="#9E9E9E")

    # Bottom decorative bar
    bottom_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.0), Inches(13.33), Inches(0.5))

    bottom_bar.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 1)

    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    summary_text = ("Das Solarfarm-Ausbauprojekt bietet Investoren eine attraktive Chance im wachsenden Markt für erneuerbare Energien. "

    add_footer(slide, 2)


def _build_category_chart_data(category_labels, series_name, values):
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = category_labels
    chart_data.add_series(series_name, values)
    return chart_data

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN, MSO_ANCHOR
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# Slide dimensions (16:9 widescreen)
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

# Color palette
NAVY_DARK = RGBColor(0x0A, 0x24, 0x63)
NAVY_MID = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x3A, 0x8C)
TEAL_ACCENT = RGBColor(0x00, 0xB4, 0xD8)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(0xF8, 0xF9, 0xFA)
GOLD_HIGHLIGHT = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xC1, 0x07)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x33, 0x33, 0x33)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6C, 0x75, 0x7D)

# Fonts and sizes
FONT_NAME = "Arial"
TITLE_SIZE = 44
SUBTITLE_SIZE = 28
BODY_SIZE = 18
SMALL_SIZE = 14
TINY_SIZE = 12
CARD_TITLE_SIZE = 22
STAT_NUMBER_SIZE = 36

# Layout constants
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT
CARD_PADDING = Inches(0.15)
ELEMENT_GAP = Inches(0.2)


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    """Set the background fill of a slide to a given hex color."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    r = int(color_hex[1:3], 16)
    g = int(color_hex[3:5], 16)
    b = int(color_hex[5:7], 16)
    fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(r, g, b)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=18, color="#FFFFFF", bold=False, italic=False, alignment=None):
    """Add a formatted text box to the slide."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment or PP_ALIGN.LEFT
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.color.rgb = color if isinstance(color, RGBColor) else RGBColor(int(color[1:3], 16), int(color[3:5], 16), int(color[5:7], 16))
    run.font.name = FONT_NAME
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.italic = italic
    txBox.vertical_anchor = MSO_ANCHOR.MIDDLE
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title="", body=""):
    """Add a styled card with rounded rectangle background and text."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE0, 0xE0, 0xE0)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + CARD_PADDING, top + CARD_PADDING, width - CARD_PADDING * 2, Inches(0.4), title, font_size=CARD_TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + CARD_PADDING, top + Inches(0.5), width - CARD_PADDING * 2, height - Inches(0.6), body, font_size=BODY_SIZE, color=DARK_TEXT)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, y_position=Inches(0.8)):
    """Add a section label with decorative line."""
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position, CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.04))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = TEAL_ACCENT
    line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, y_position + Inches(0.15), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.6), text, font_size=TITLE_SIZE, color=NAVY_DARK, bold=True)


def add_footer(slide, text="CONFIDENTIAL | Energy Renewable Investment Analysis 2024"):
    """Add a footer to the slide."""
    add_text_box(slide, MARGIN_LEFT, Inches(7.0), CONTENT_WIDTH, Inches(0.35), text, font_size=TINY_SIZE, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Add an image if it exists, otherwise a styled placeholder."""
    try:
        if os.path.exists(path):
            slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
        else:
            shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
            shape.fill.solid()
            shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEC, 0xF1)
            shape.line.color.rgb = TEAL_ACCENT
            shape.line.width = Pt(2)
            add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.3), top + height / 2 - Inches(0.2), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.4), "Image Placeholder", font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    except Exception:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE8, 0xEC, 0xF1)
        shape.line.color.rgb = TEAL_ACCENT
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_COLOR = "#2C3E50"
ACCENT_COLOR = "#3498DB"
LIGHT_BG = "#F8F9FA"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
MUTED_TEXT = "#7F8C8D"
SUCCESS_GREEN = "#27AE60"

FONT_HEADING = "Aptos"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_color):
    h = hex_color.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex=LIGHT_BG):
    bg_fill = slide.background.fill
    bg_fill.solid()
    bg_fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, x, y, w, h, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color="#2C3E50", alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, w, h)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color)
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, w, h, title_text="", body_text="", bg_color=WHITE):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(230, 230, 230)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    tf = shape.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    tf.margin_left = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_right = Inches(0.15)
    tf.margin_top = Inches(0.12)
    tf.margin_bottom = Inches(0.12)

    if title_text:
        p_title = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run_t = p_title.add_run()
        run_t.text = title_text
        run_t.font.size = Pt(13)
        run_t.font.bold = True
        run_t.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_COLOR)
        run_t.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    if body_text:
        p_body = tf.add_paragraph()
        p_body.space_before = Pt(4)
        run_b = p_body.add_run()
        run_b.text = body_text
        run_b.font.size = Pt(10.5)
        run_b.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MUTED_TEXT)
        run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, label_text):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, Inches(4), Inches(0.35))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = label_text.upper()
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)
    run.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    bar_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y + Inches(0.38), Inches(0.6), Pt(2))
    bar_shape.fill.solid()
    bar_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)
    bar_shape.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, text="Email Marketing Best Practices | Content Writers Guide"):
    footer_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.15), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.35))
    footer_bar.fill.solid()
    footer_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_COLOR)
    footer_bar.line.fill.background()

    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(0.5), Inches(7.18), Inches(12), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, w, h):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, w, h)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = RGBColor(240, 240, 240)
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x + Inches(0.3), y + h / 2 - Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.3))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = "Image Placeholder"
        run.font.size = Pt(9)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(MUTED_TEXT)

    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])

    # Left side - main tip box
    main_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, Inches(0.8), Inches(1.3), Inches(5.2), Inches(4.5))
    main_box.fill.solid()
    main_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(PRIMARY_COLOR)
    main_box.line.fill.background()

    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(1.0), Inches(1.6), Inches(4.8), Inches(1.2))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = "Keep It Under 50 Characters"
    run.font.size = Pt(22)

    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)

    tf2 = txBox2.text_frame
    p2 = tf2.paragraphs[0]
    run2 = p2.add_run()

    # Right side - three strategy cards
    strategies = [
        ("Personalize", "Use the recipient's name and segment by behavior"),
        ("Create Urgency", "Words like 'today' or 'limited' boost opens"),
        ("Spark Curiosity", "Tease value without giving everything away"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.0)

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(strategies):
        y = start_y + i * (card_h + gap_v)
        add_card(slide, Inches(6.5), y, card_w, card_h, title_text=title, body_text=body)

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_04_content_structure(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, LIGHT_BG)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "Content Structure")

    steps = [
        ("Header", "Clear sender name and recognizable subject line"),
        ("Body", "Concise message with scannable paragraphs and bullet points"),
        ("CTA", "Single clear call-to-action button or link"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(3.2)
    card_h = Inches(1.6)
    gap_v = Inches(0.4)
    start_y = Inches(1.5)
    x_pos = (SLIDE_WIDTH - card_w) / 2

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(steps):
        y = start_y + i * (card_h + gap_v)

        # Vertical accent line on left
        if i < len(steps) - 1:
            line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x_pos + Inches(0.3), y + card_h, Pt(2), gap_v)
            line_shape.fill.solid()
            line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)

        add_card(slide, x_pos, y, card_w, card_h, title_text=title, body_text=body)

    # Step numbers as circles
    for i in range(len(steps)):
        y = start_y + i * (card_h + gap_v)
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x_pos - Inches(0.5), y + card_h / 2 - Inches(0.18), Inches(0.36), Inches(0.36))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(ACCENT_COLOR)
        circle.line.fill.background()

        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x_pos - Inches(0.45), y + card_h / 2 - Inches(0.18), Inches(0.36), Inches(0.36))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = str(i + 1)
        run.font.size = Pt(14)
        run.font.bold = True
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
        run.font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_05_design_tips(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = ""
        title_shape.clear()

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.5), "Design & Formatting Tips")

    tips = [
        ("Whitespace", "Use generous spacing between sections for readability"),
        ("Font Size", "Body text should be 14-16pt minimum"),
        ("Mobile First", "Over 60% of emails are opened on mobile devices"),
        ("Clear CTA", "One primary action per email with contrasting button color"),
    ]

    card_w = Inches(5.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.3)
    gap_x = Inches(0.4)
    gap_y = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = (SLIDE_WIDTH - 2 * card_w - gap_x) / 2

    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(tips):
        row = i // 2
        col = i % 2
        x = start_x + col * (card_w + gap_x)
        y = Inches(1.4) + row * (card_h + gap_y)

        add_card(slide, x, y, card_w, card_h, title_text=title, body_text=body)

    add_footer(slide)

Generate a PowerPoint presentation for our healthcare internal team regarding clinical trial updates. Save the file as 'Clinical_Trials_Update.pptx', write all content in English, and use a 16:9 Widescreen landscape orientation. The theme should be corporate blue and white with clean, professional typography. Do not make any external API calls or scrape the web for images or data; embed everything statically. You are required to use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of ChartType when generating charts. Furthermore, you must ensure defensive programming by checking that slide.shapes.title is not None prior to setting its .text attribute.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE


# ── Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Clinical_Trials_Update.pptx"

PRIMARY_BLUE = RGBColor(0x0A, 0x4D, 0x8C)
ACCENT_BLUE = RGBColor(0x2E, 0x86, 0xDE)
LIGHT_BLUE = RGBColor(0xEB, 0xF5, 0xFB)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
DARK_TEXT = RGBColor(0x1B, 0x2A, 0x41)
MUTED_GRAY = RGBColor(0x6B, 0x72, 0x80)
SUCCESS_GREEN = RGBColor(0x10, 0xB9, 0x81)
WARNING_AMBER = RGBColor(0xF5, 0x9E, 0x0B)
PHASE_I_COLOR = RGBColor(0xEF, 0x44, 0x44)
PHASE_II_COLOR = RGBColor(0xF5, 0x9E, 0x0B)
PHASE_III_COLOR = RGBColor(0x10, 0xB9, 0x81)
PHASE_IV_COLOR = RGBColor(0x3B, 0x82, 0xF6)

FONT_TITLE = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)


# ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color):
    """Fill the slide background with a solid RGBColor."""
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = color


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_TEXT, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    """Add a text box with specified formatting."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title_text, body_text, accent_color=ACCENT_BLUE):
    """Add a styled card with an accent bar and text."""
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    shape.line.color.rgb = RGBColor(0xE5, 0xE7, 0xEB)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    # Accent bar at top of card
    accent_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left + Inches(0.08), top + Inches(0.08), width - Inches(0.16), Inches(0.06))
    accent_bar.fill.solid()
    accent_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = accent_color
    accent_bar.line.fill.background()

    # Title inside card
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.25), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), title_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_TEXT)

    # Body text inside card
    add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.25), top + Inches(0.75), width - Inches(0.5), height - Inches(1.0), body_text, font_size=12, bold=False, color=MUTED_GRAY)

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, label_text, left, top):
    """Add a small uppercase section header."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(4), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = label_text.upper()
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    run.font.size = Pt(10)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = ACCENT_BLUE


def add_footer(slide, text="CONFIDENTIAL"):
    """Add a centered footer at the bottom of the slide."""
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(4.3), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    run.font.size = Pt(9)
    run.font.color.rgb = MUTED_GRAY


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    """Insert an image if it exists; otherwise draw a styled placeholder."""
    import os
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_BLUE
        shape.line.color.rgb = ACCENT_BLUE
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6), "Image Placeholder", font_size=12, bold=False, color=MUTED_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Slide Builders ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_title(prs):
    """Slide 1 — Title / Cover."""
    layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]  # Blank
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, PRIMARY_BLUE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(9.3), Inches(1.2), "Clinical Trials Update", font_size=44, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(8.3), Inches(0.6), "Internal Team Briefing — Q1 2025", font_size=20, bold=False, color=RGBColor(0xB0, 0xD4, 0xF1), alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Decorative accent bar
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(5.8), Inches(4.6), Inches(1.7), Inches(0.04))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide)


def slide_overview(prs):
    """Slide 2 — Trial Overview Cards."""
    layout = prs.slide_layouts[6]
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(layout)
    set_slide_background(slide, WHITE)

    add_section_label(slide, "Overview", Inches(0.5), Inches(0.3))

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "CLINICAL TRIAL OVERVIEW"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:

            run.font.color.rgb = DARK_TEXT

    # Three overview cards
    card_width = Inches(3.4)
    card_height = Inches(2.5)
    gap = Inches(0.3)
    start_x = Inches(1.5)
    y_pos = Inches(1.6)

    add_card(slide, start_x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, "Study Name", "NCT04827193 — Phase III randomized controlled trial evaluating efficacy of novel therapeutic agent in oncology patients.", ACCENT_BLUE)
    add_card(slide, start_x + card_width + gap, y_pos, card_width, card_height, "Current Phase", "Phase III — Active enrollment across 45 sites globally. Primary endpoint: progression-free survival at 12 months.", SUCCESS_GREEN)
    add_card(slide, start_x + (card_width + gap) * 2, y_pos, card_width, card_height, "Status", "On track for Q3 2025 primary analysis. Interim safety review completed with no signal of concern.", WARNING_AMBER)

    add_footer(slide)

I need a corporate finance presentation targeting our C-Suite executives about the annual budget forecast. Name the output file 'Annual_Budget_Forecast.pptx', use Spanish for all text content, and set the slide size to 4:3 Standard in landscape mode. The visual style should be professional gold and black with elegant serif fonts. You are not allowed to fetch data or images via external APIs; rely solely on hardcoded values within your codebase. When adding charts, you must utilize XL_CHART_TYPE rather than importing ChartType. Also, always verify that slide.shapes.title is not None before attempting to assign text to it.

import os
from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData


# ── Constants ───────────────────────────────────────────────

SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)
OUTPUT_FILE = "Annual_Budget_Forecast.pptx"

GOLD_PRIMARY = "#D4AF37"
GOLD_LIGHT = "#C9A84C"
GOLD_DARK = "#B8860B"
BLACK = "#0A0A0A"
BLACK_SOFT = "#1A1A1A"
BLACK_CARD = "#2D2D2D"
WHITE = "#FFFFFF"
GRAY_LIGHT = "#F5F5F5"
GRAY_TEXT = "#CCCCCC"

FONT_TITLE = "Georgia"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CARD_GAP = 0.3


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str: str) -> RGBColor:
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex: str):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(
    slide, left, top, width, height, text,
    font_size=14, bold=False, color_hex=GOLD_PRIMARY,
    font_name=FONT_BODY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT
):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.text = text
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)
    run.font.name = font_name
    p.alignment = alignment
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title, body, bg_color=BLACK_CARD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(bg_color)
    shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD_DARK)
    shape.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.3))
    tf_t = title_box.text_frame
    p_t = tf_t.paragraphs[0]
    run_t = p_t.runs[0] if p_t.runs else p_t.add_run()
    run_t.font.size = Pt(12)
    run_t.font.bold = True
    run_t.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD_PRIMARY)
    run_t.font.name = FONT_TITLE
    p_t.text = title

    body_box = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6))
    tf_b = body_box.text_frame
    p_b = tf_b.paragraphs[0]
    run_b = p_b.runs[0] if p_b.runs else p_b.add_run()
    run_b.font.size = Pt(11)
    run_b.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(WHITE)
    run_b.font.name = FONT_BODY
    p_b.text = body

    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, Inches(8), Inches(0.4))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.size = Pt(16)
    run.font.bold = True
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD_PRIMARY)
    run.font.name = FONT_TITLE
    p.text = text


def add_footer(slide, slide_num):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(Inches(4.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1), Inches(0.3))
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
    run.font.size = Pt(8)
    run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GRAY_TEXT)
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY
    p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
    p.text = f"{slide_num} / 6"


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(BLACK_CARD)
        shape.line.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD_DARK)
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)

        txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left + Inches(0.3), top + Inches(height / 2 - Inches(0.1)), width - Inches(0.6), Inches(0.2))
        tf = txBox.text_frame
        p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        run = p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run()
        run.font.size = Pt(10)
        run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD_PRIMARY)
        run.font.name = FONT_BODY
        p.alignment = PP_ALIGN.CENTER
        p.text = "Imagen de marcador de posición"


# ── Slide Builders ─────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_01_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])  # Blank layout
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(3), Inches(0.8),
        "Annual Budget Forecast", font_size=36, bold=True,
        color_hex=GOLD_PRIMARY, font_name=FONT_TITLE
    )

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(3.7), Inches(3.2), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.4),
        "FY 2025 — Executive Summary", font_size=18, bold=False,
        color_hex=GOLD_LIGHT, font_name=FONT_BODY
    )

    line_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(3.5), Inches(4.0), Inches(3), Pt(2))
    line_shape.fill.solid()
    line_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD_PRIMARY)
    line_shape.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(3.7), Inches(4.8), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.3),
        "CONFIDENTIAL — Board of Directors", font_size=11, bold=False,
        color_hex=GRAY_TEXT, font_name=FONT_BODY
    )

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def slide_02_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
        for run in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs[0].runs:
            run.font.color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(GOLD_PRIMARY)
            run.font.name = FONT_TITLE

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Key Performance Indicators")

    kpi_data = [
        ("Revenue", "$48.2M", "+12% YoY"),
        ("EBITDA Margin", "22%", "+3pp YoY"),
        ("Net Income", "$10.6M", "+18% YoY"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.7)
    for i, (title_text, value, subtext) in enumerate(kpi_data):
        left = Inches(0.6 + i * 3.0)
        add_card(slide, left, Inches(1.8), card_width, Inches(1.4), title_text, f"{value}\n{subtext}")

    add_text_box(
        slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.5), Inches(8.8), Inches(2.5),
        "The company is projected to deliver strong financial performance in FY 2025, driven by robust revenue growth across all business segments and disciplined cost management. EBITDA margins have expanded significantly due to operational efficiencies and favorable product mix shifts.",
        font_size=13, color_hex=GRAY_TEXT
    )

    add_footer(slide, 2)

    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, BLACK)

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title

    add_section_label(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.2), "Revenue by Segment")

    )
